title: Creative Video Editor (E-commerce and Social Media) - Remote
description:
Job Summary:



We are looking for a highly skilled and creative Video Editor who excels at transforming raw clips and creative concepts into engaging, high-converting video content for social media ads and Amazon product videos.



This role requires more than just technical proficiency—it demands a strong storytelling ability, a deep understanding of e-commerce video trends, and the ability to craft videos that capture and hold attention with minimal supervision. As Mr. Beast says, "the magic happens in the editing room"—your work will be the d
 factor in whether a video succeeds or fails.



You'll collaborate closely with the marketing and creative teams to bring products to life through compelling visual storytelling that drives conversions and enhances brand visibility.



Primary Duties and Responsibilities:



Edit and produce high-converting video ads for platforms like
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

Transform raw footage and creative briefs into engaging videos that capture attention and hold viewers from start to finish.

Craft compelling narratives using motion graphics, text overlays, sound design, and special effects.

Optimize videos for different platforms, ensuring the best performance on mobile and desktop.

Work autonomously—taking scripts, clips, and hooks and turning them into attention-grabbing videos without heavy supervision.

Edit footage to highlight key selling points, user testimonials, and product demonstrations.

Stay ahead of trends in video marketing, storytelling, and social media best practices for e-commerce brands.

Manage multiple projects while maintaining quality and meeting deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

Qualifications:



Proven experience as a Video Editor, preferably in e-commerce, social media marketing, or DTC brands.

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or similar editing software.

Strong understanding of social media ad formats, aspect ratios, and platform-specific video requirements.

Ability to edit fast-paced, attention-grabbing content optimized for conversions.

Exceptional storytelling skills—knowing how to keep viewers engaged from start to finish.

Experience with motion graphics, text animation, and sound design to enhance engagement.

Ability to work independently and take creative direction, producing high-quality content with minimal supervision.

Preferred Qualifications:



Experience editing videos for beauty, health, or lifestyle brands.

Knowledge of A/B testing for video ads and performance optimization strategies.

Familiarity with Amazon product video guidelines and best practices.

Basic skills in color grading, lighting correction, and sound mixing.

About Us:



Skin Research Institute is a fast-growing e-commerce brand dedicated to creating high-quality beauty and wellness products. Our marketing team thrives on delivering compelling, high-performing video content that resonates with our audience and drives sales.



Learn more about us:











To Apply:



Submit your portfolio of past video projects—especially social media ads and Amazon product videos. We are looking for someone who can bring creative concepts to life and create videos that demand attention.



Let’s create standout content together!

Key Responsibilities:



1. Manage and maintain the company’s social media accounts on
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

3. Design graphics and social media creatives using Canva

6. Monitor social media performance and suggest strategies to improve engagement

7. Stay updated on social media trends and propose creative content ideas

Qualifications:



1. Proven experience managing social media platforms 
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)

4. Creative mindset with good judgment in content development and visual presentation

3. Willing to work graveyard shift

To Apply:

Send your updated resume and portfolio to

title: Senior WordPress Developer / Technical Lead
description:
About Truffle Digital



Truffle Digital manages and maintains a large portfolio of 150+ live client websites, primarily built on WordPress.

Our focus is long-term client relationships, stability, and quality - not one-off project builds.

We are currently growing both our client base and our internal team, and as part of that growth we are strengthening our technical leadership.

We are looking for a Senior WordPress Developer / Technical Lead to take ownership of technical standards, development quality, and architecture across our entire website portfolio.

This role exists to ensure that technical decisions, QA, and development standards are handled by a senior engineer - not the CEO.



The Role

As Senior WordPress Developer / Technical Lead, you will act as the technical authority across Truffle Digital’s client websites.

You will ensure that all development work - whether completed by internal developers or future tea
mbers — is built correctly, securely, and consistently.

This role is hands-on but leadership focused.

You will review work, guide developers, and ensure that our entire portfolio of sites maintains strong technical standards.

This is not a project management role and not a junior position.

You will be trusted to make technical decisions, review work, and raise issues early.



Key Responsibilities

Technical leadership & standards

Own technical standards across all client websites

Define best practices for WordPress, Elementor usage, plugins, performance, and security

Ensure consistency across a large multi-site portfolio

Identify and manage technical debt

Make pragmatic technical decisions that balance quality and speed



Quality assurance

Perform technical QA on all development work before release

Ensure changes do not introduce regressions or performance issues

Ensure security and stability standards are maintained

Approve work as production-ready



Task review & technical guidance

Review tasks prepared by the Technical Project Manager before work begins

Clarify technical approach, scope, and risks

Provide technical guidance where required

Ensure implementations follow agreed standards



Team support

Support and guide developers (current and future)

Review code and implementations when needed

Provide clear technical feedback

Set clear expectations for what “done” means



Technical Environment

WordPress (core platform)

Elementor (used across most client sites)

Custom themes and plugins

Third-party tools and integrations

Git workflows

Staging environments

High-volume agency environment with many live sites

You must be comfortable working within an Elementor ecosystem while maintaining strong engineering standards for performance, structure, and maintainability.



You Must Be Comfortable

Working within existing Elementor builds

Improving structure and performance of Elementor-based sites

Making pragmatic decisions based on real-world constraints

Balancing quality with speed and maintainability

Working across multiple live websites simultaneously



Required Experience

5+ years professional web development experience

Strong WordPress experience in production environments

Hands-on experience working with Elementor

Experience working in an agency or managing multiple websites

Strong understanding of:

performance optimisation

security

debugging

site stability

Comfortable reviewing other developers’ work and giving clear feedback



Nice to Have

Experience mentoring junior developers

Familiarity with Git workflows

Experience working with staging environments

Performance auditing (Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse)

Experience managing or standardising large site portfolios



What This Role Is NOT

This role is not:

a page builder role

a project manager role

a client support role

a junior developer role

This role owns technical authority, quality, and standards.



What Success Looks Like

Clear technical standards across all sites

Fewer bugs, rollbacks, and emergency fixes

Developers know exactly what is expected before starting work

A stable and well-maintained portfolio of websites

The CEO is no longer involved in technical QA or implementation decisions



Why Join Truffle Digital

Long-term, stable role (not project-to-project)

High trust and autonomy

Opportunity to shape engineering standards and processes

Remote-friendly environment

Work that values quality over chaos

Be part of a growing agency with an expanding client portfolio and development team





Important



This role is for experienced developers only. If you have primarily worked as a page builder or Elementor implementer without deeper WordPress development experience, this role is unlikely to be a good fit.



Application Questions

Please include answers to the following in your submission:



How many WordPress sites have you worked on simultaneously in production?

Describe a performance or stability issue you identified and fixed on a WordPress site.

Have you reviewed and approved other developers' work before release?

Please write a short paragraph explaining a complex technical problem you solved on a WordPress site.

title: SEO Specialist Implementor (Remote)
description:
You will take ownership of assigned SEO accounts and execute initiatives aligned with the SEO strategy developed by the SEO Analyst. This role focuses on implementing, validating, and maintaining on-page and technical SEO improvements that enhance site performance, visibility, and search rankings. You will coordinate closely with the SEO Analyst to troubleshoot issues, propose corrective actions, implement approved fixes, and ensure all SEO tasks are completed accurately and on time.

We are looking for someone who wants to learn, grow, and build a long-term career with us and who values being part of a dedicated team and supportive management. If you’re seeking a short-term role, this may not be the best fit.



Key Responsibilities



SEO Execution and Ownership

 • Own day-to-day SEO implementation for assigned accounts

 • Execute Analyst-approved SEO strategies and initiatives

 • Coordinate with the SEO Analyst on troubleshooting, root-cause analysis, and proposed fixes

 • Ensure all assigned SEO tasks are completed on schedule and meet quality standards



On-Page SEO Implementation

 • Apply Analyst-provided titles, meta descriptions, header tags, alt text, and schema

 • Update content and metadata to align with approved keywords and search intent

 • Maintain consistent formatting, internal linking, and technical standards across pages



Technical SEO Support

 • Identify and address crawl errors, indexation issues, duplicate content, and broken links

 • Support Core Web Vitals, page speed, and mobile usability improvements using approved tools

 • Proactively flag technical issues and coordinate fixes with the Analyst and developers



Performance Tracking and Quality Assurance

 • Run and review audits using Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, GA4, and related tools

 • Validate that SEO implementations match Analyst instructions and function correctly

 • Document anomalies, unexpected outcomes, or risks and escalate for Analyst review



Keyword and Content Execution

 • Implement approved keyword placements across blogs, product pages, and landing pages

 • Optimize content according to SEO best practices and Analyst guidance

 • Build and maintain internal linking structures as directed



Reporting and Documentation

 • Compile SEO performance data for SEO Analysts and Client Services Managers

 • Maintain clear task documentation for completed work and open items

 • Provide before-and-after screenshots or notes to support QA and review



Collaboration and Communication

 • Work closely with SEO Analysts to align on priorities, timelines, and fixes

 • Coordinate with content teams and developers to ensure smooth implementation

 • Provide timely updates on completed tasks, blockers, and escalation items

 • Share observations and improvement ideas to support the client’s SEO roadmap



Learning and Development

 • Continue SEO training through guided practice and self-study

 • Participate in coaching sessions with SEO Analysts



Shopify SEO Implementation

Basic working knowledge of Shopify is required. The SEO Implementor will execute SEO improvements directly within the Shopify platform, including updating product and collection metadata, editing page content, maintaining internal linking, managing product visibility for Google Merchant Center, and ensuring SEO best practices across templates and structured data. The role also supports large-scale catalog updates, product organization, and feed-related fixes that support the team’s 6-pillar SEO framework, particularly Technical Health, Content Strategy, and Special Projects such as catalog expansion or platform updates. Experience working with Shopify product data, collections, and bulk editing tools is highly valued.



Key Experience Requirements

Required Skills and Tools

 • Technical SEO fundamentals

 • Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, GA4, SEMrush

 • Google Sheets and CSV workflows

 • Excel or Google Sheets formulas

 • Strong written English and disciplined documentation practices





Additional Notes

Employment Type

 • Full-time, remote

Compensation

 • USD 6 per hour, paid monthly via bank transfer

Schedule

 • Day shift, Philippine time

 • Required overlap with US team from 8:00 AM to 12:00 NN PH time

 • Daily check-in required between 11:00 AM and 12:00 NN PH time unless changed in writing



Apply Here:

title: Real Estate Administrative Virtual Assistant (Long-Term, PST Hours)
description:
Work Hours: Full-time (40 hrs/week), Monday–Friday with U.S. Pacific Time overlap

Pay: $750–$1,050/month, based on experience

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Start Date: ASAP

Role Type: Long-term, stable position



About the Company



We are a U.S.-based commercial real estate and property management firm that manages investment properties and supports leasing, sales, operations, and reporting for our clients.



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Administrative Virtual Assistant to support our back-office operations. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys organized, accuracy-driven work and communicates consistently during work hours.



Role Overview



You will support our internal team by keeping systems, data, and documents accurate and up to date. This is a core administrative role focused on execution and organization—not sales or marketing strategy.



Success in this role means we can trust you to manage recurring tasks independently and communicate clearly when something needs attention.



Key Responsibilities



Administrative & Data Support

 • Entering and updating information in Yardi (property management software)

 • Maintaining and updating Excel / Google Sheets

 • Organizing files and folders in Google Drive

 • Handling general administrative tasks (tracking, follow-ups, organization)



CRM & System Management

 • Updating and maintaining CRM records (contacts, deals, notes)

 • Keeping data clean, accurate, and well-organized

 • Supporting basic workflow updates as instructed



Documents & Contracts (Template-Based)

 • Organizing and updating contract and lease documents using provided templates

 • Tracking key dates and document status

 • Ensuring files are complete, accurate, and properly stored



Drip
 & Research Support

 • Updating and managing drip
 campaigns using pre-written templates

(formatting, scheduling, list/tag management)

 • Conducting online research and data gathering as needed



Tools You’ll Use



Experience with or willingness to learn:

 • Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

 • Excel

 • CRM systems (Zoho, GoHighLevel, or similar)

 • Yardi (experience is a plus; training provided)



What We’re Looking For

 • This role is best suited for someone who has supported U.S.-based teams and is comfortable working independently.

 • 1–3 years of experience as an admin VA or operations assistant

 • Strong attention to detail and accuracy

 • Comfortable working with spreadsheets and structured data

 • Organized, dependable, and proactive

 • Fast and professional communicator during work hours

 • Able to follow systems and instructions consistently



Real estate experience is a plus, but not required.



Work Expectations

 • Full-time availability with PST workday overlap

 • Responses within business day during workdays

 • Reliable internet and consistent attendance



What Success Looks Like

 • 30 days: Systems, spreadsheets, CRM, and documents are accurate and consistently updated

 • 60 days: You handle recurring admin and CRM tasks independently with minimal supervision



Why This Role

 • Long-term, stable position

 • Clear expectations and structured systems

 • Opportunity to grow responsibilities over time

 • Performance-based bonuses and 13th month pay for long-term tea
mbers



How to Apply



Please include:

 1. A brief summary of your admin/VA experience

 2. Your professional resume

 3. Your experience with Excel or Google Sheets (be specific)

 4. Any experience with CRMs or Yardi (if none, say none)

 5. Quick Loom or other video discussing your experience 

 6. Your internet speed test result

 7. Include the phrase “DETAILS MATTER” somewhere in your application



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.

title: Full Stack Engineer / AI Automation Architect
description:
Full Stack Engineer / AI Automation Architect

Sliceo

Remote | Full-Time | US Time Zone Overlap Preferred



Build the Automation Infrastructure for a New Category of PropTech



Sliceo is building the automation and integration infrastructure for companies operating in the community association management and property technology ecosystem.



Most companies in this space run on disconnected systems — CRMs, accounting software, management platforms, spreadsheets, and dozens of operational tools that don’t communicate with each other.



We exist to fix that.



Sliceo designs and implements modern technology stacks that integrate business systems, automate workflows, and introduce AI-driven operational intelligence.



We are looking for a Founding Full Stack Engineer / AI Automation Architect who can design and build the systems that power this platform.



This role is not about building simple web apps.



It’s about connecting entire ecosystems of software through APIs, automation, and intelligent infrastructure.



What You’ll Be Building

You will work directly with leadership to build:

• API-driven system integrations across multiple platforms

• automation pipelines that replace manual operational work

• AI-enabled workflows that process and generate operational data

• internal tools for managing complex software ecosystems

• middleware platforms that connect disparate systems



You will architect systems that sit between:

• CRM platforms

• accounting systems

• property management platforms

• communication tools

• analytics systems

• AI services



This Role Is Ideal For Someone Who

• Thinks in systems, not just code

• Enjoys connecting complex platforms together

• Has deep experience with APIs and integrations

• Has built automation infrastructure before

• Is comfortable designing architecture from scratch

• Enjoys solving messy real-world software problems



Core Responsibilities



Systems Architecture

Design the architecture that connects multiple SaaS platforms through APIs and automation.

API Integrations

Build integrations across CRMs, accounting platforms, operational software, and internal tools.

Automation Infrastructure

Design automation pipelines that replace repetitive manual work across business operations.

Full Stack Development

Build internal dashboards, integration tools, and operational systems.

AI Workflow Integration

Implement AI-driven processes that automate reporting, document processing, and operational intelligence.

Debugging & Optimization

Troubleshoot complex integration problems across multiple systems.



Technical Requirements

We are looking for engineers comfortable operating across multiple layers of a system.



Core Engineering Skills

Strong experience with:

• Python or Node.js

• REST API architecture

• API integrations

• OAuth and token-based authentication

• webhooks

• data transformation pipelines



Full Stack Development

Experience building web applications using:

• React or similar front-end frameworks

• modern backend frameworks

• relational or NoSQL databases

Integration Engineering

Deep experience working with:

• third-party APIs

• system integrations

• automation pipelines

• middleware architecture

AI Integration

Experience working with:

• LLM APIs (OpenAI or similar)

• AI-powered workflow automation

• data processing pipelines



Bonus Experience

Highly valued but not required:

• building internal automation platforms

• working with SaaS integrations

• workflow automation tools

• cloud infrastructure

• data processing systems

Experience with property management software like CINC Systems is helpful but not required.



The Kind of Engineer We’re Looking For

The best candidates for this role:

• have built real systems, not just small projects

• understand how software platforms interact

• are comfortable debugging complex integration problems

• enjoy designing infrastructure and automation

• like working closely with founders in early-stage environments



Why This Role Is Different

Most developer roles focus on building features.

This role focuses on building systems that connect other systems.

You will be working on:

• complex software integrations

• automation architecture

• AI-driven workflows

• infrastructure that powers operational systems

This is a rare opportunity to help build the core technical architecture of a new company.





Application Requirements

To apply for this role, please submit the following materials.

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Accountant & Bookkeeping Specialist (Xero Expert)
description:
[IMPORTANT: Failure to follow the application instructions will result in automatic disqualification.]



We are looking for a Senior Accountant with strong bookkeeping expertise to join our growing international team.



This role is ideal for someone who not only manages day-to-day bookkeeping but also understands the bigger financial picture — someone who can maintain accurate financial records while supporting financial reporting, forecasting, and business decision-making.



You will play a key role in ensuring financial accuracy, maintaining compliance with Australian accounting standards, and helping leadership understand the financial health of the business.



If you are highly organized, analytical, and experienced in Xero and financial reporting, we want to hear from you.



This position is perfect for a detail-oriented accounting professional who enjoys both operational bookkeeping and higher-level financial analysis.



[What You’ll Do]

Financial Management

- Maintain and manage accurate financial records across all company accounts

- Oversee daily bookkeeping functions and ensure all financial transactions are properly recorded

- Maintain general ledger accuracy and integrity



Account Reconciliation

- Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, and financial transactions regularly

- Investigate and resolve discrepancies



Financial Reporting

- Prepare and review:

• Monthly financial statements

• Profit & Loss reports

• Balance sheets

• Cash flow reports

- Provide financial insights and recommendations to management



Accounts Payable & Receivable

- Manage incoming and outgoing payments

- Track outstanding invoices

- Maintain positive vendor and client payment relationships



Payroll Support

- Assist with payroll processing

- Ensure accurate employee payments and financial records



Tax & Compliance Support

- Assist with BAS preparation and other tax-related documentation

- Ensure financial records remain compliant with accounting standards



Budgeting & Forecasting

- Assist management with:

• Financial forecasts

• Budget preparation

• Cost analysis



Xero Management

- Maintain and optimize the company’s accounting system in Xero

- Ensure proper account categorization and financial organization



Financial Data Organization

- Maintain well-organized financial documentation for reporting, auditing, and compliance



[What We’re Looking For]

Senior Accounting Experience

- 3+ years experience in accounting or bookkeeping

- Experience managing financial reporting



Xero Expertise

- Strong experience using Xero

- Experience reconciling accounts and preparing reports within Xero



Australian Accounting Knowledge (Highly Preferred)

- Familiarity with:

• BAS

• GST

• Australian financial compliance



Strong Analytical Skills

- Ability to interpret financial data and provide insights



Detail-Oriented

- High accuracy with financial records and reconciliations



Organization & Time Management

- Ability to manage multiple financial tasks and meet deadlines



Communication Skills

- Clear written and verbal English

- Ability to communicate financial information clearly to non-finance tea
mbers



Tech Proficiency

Experience with tools such as:

- Xero

- Google Workspace

- Excel / Google Sheets

- Accounting tools (QuickBooks experience is a plus)



[Bonus Points If You Have]

- Experience working with Australian companies

- Experience supporting growing startups or remote teams

- CPA / Accounting certification

- Experience with financial forecasting and management reporting



[Why Join Our Team]

- Work remotely with an international team

- Opportunity to grow into a Senior Finance Manager role

- Work in a fast-growing company where your input matters

- Long-term role with stability



[How to Apply]

If you believe you're the right person for this role, we want to hear from you.

Please submit:

1. Your CV

2. Portfolio / Sample Work

Create a Google Drive folder containing:

- Resume

- Any relevant financial reports

- Sample reconciliation reports

- Financial dashboards or reports you have prepared

Make sure the folder is shareable to anyone with the link.

3. Short Video Introduction

Record a 1–2 minute video introducing yourself and covering:

- Your accounting experience

- Your experience with Xero

- Your experience working with Australian businesses

- Why you believe you are the right fit for this role



IMPORTANT: Applications that do not include all required items will not be reviewed.



We’re excited to meet someone who is passionate about financial accuracy, business growth, and strong accounting practices.

title: ECommerce Automation, Shopify & CRO Expert
description:
Outdoor TV Australia, the country’s leading supplier of Outdoor AV equipment, is looking for an Ecommerce Automation, Shopify & CRO Specialist to help build and optimise the systems that drive our online sales.



This role will work directly with the General Manager to implement and execute our ecommerce strategy over the next 12 months.



This is a hands-on technical role, not a general marketing assistant position. The successful candidate will help build and improve the systems behind our ecommerce business — including Shopify architecture, automation, conversion optimisation and
 flows.



We are looking for someone who enjoys solving problems, building systems and improving performance, and who wants to grow with the company long term.



Key Projects Over The Next 12 Months



You will be responsible for helping implement several major improvements across our ecommerce stack, including:



• Shopify website architecture improvements – building decision-based product flows and improving how customers navigate the site

• Conversion rate optimisation (CRO) – improving product pages and landing pages to increase add-to-cart and purchase rates

•
 marketing automation – building automated flows based on customer behaviour, product interest and quiz results

• Automation across marketing, sales and operations using tools such as Zapier, Make or similar platforms

• Customer journey optimisation including quizzes and guided product selection systems

• Working closely with our SEO and PPC team to ensure pages are built in a way that supports both conversion and search performance

• Improving reporting and data visibility across ecommerce and sales systems



What We're Looking For



The ideal candidate will have strong experience with:



• Shopify (site structure, product pages, apps, integrations)

• Conversion Rate Optimisation (CRO)

• Marketing automation tools such as Zapier, Make, or n8n

•
 marketing platforms such as Klaviyo

• Building workflows and integrations between platforms

• Understanding of customer journeys and ecommerce funnels



Bonus experience includes:



• Shopify theme editing or front-end experience

• Quiz tools such as Octane AI

• CRM integrations

• Analytics and reporting dashboards



What This Role Is Not



This is not a social media management role.



It is focused on:



• ecommerce systems

• conversion optimisation

• automation

• building scalable processes



Benefits



• 5 days paid sick leave annually

• 15 days paid annual leave annually

• Annual salary increases

• Long-term career opportunity as the business grows



Working Hours



Our head office is based in Sydney, Australia.



The successful candidate must be able to work 9am – 5pm Sydney time (Monday – Friday).



Why This Role Is Different



You will be working directly with the business owner and helping build the systems that drive the company's growth.



If you enjoy building systems, solving problems and improving performance, this role offers a chance to have real impact rather than just completing small marketing tasks.



IMPORTANT TASKS



To show that you are suitable for this role - in your reply please answer:



1. Tell us about a Shopify site you have worked on.

What improvements did you implement and what was the result?



2. Briefly describe one automation you have built.

Example: connecting two platforms, automating
 flows, or creating workflow automations.

title: Website Designer
description:
Job Title: Website Designer

Department: Marketing / Digital / Creative

Location: [Remote]

Employment Type: Full-Time / Part-Time / Contract



Job Summary

We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Website Designer to design visually appealing, user-friendly websites that align with our brand and business goals. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of design principles, user experience (UX), and responsive design to create engaging digital experiences across multiple devices. This person must understand SEO and will have knowledge in building websites in Wordpress, WIX or other web building platforms.



Key Responsibilities

*Design and create visually engaging website layouts, graphics, and user interfaces.

*Collaborate with developers, marketers, and content teams to ensure design functionality and brand consistency.

*Develop wireframes, prototypes, and mockups for new website features and pages.

*Ensure websites are responsive and optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

*Maintain and update existing websites with improved design and usability.

*Optimize design elements for performance, accessibility, and SEO best practices.

*Conduct usability testing and gather feedback to improve user experience.

*Stay up-to-date with current web design trends, technologies, and tools.



Required Qualifications

*Web Design, Graphic Design, Digital Media, or a related field (or equivalent experience).

*Proven experience designing websites with a strong portfolio.

*Proficiency in design tools such as Adobe XD, Figma, Sketch, or Adobe Creative Suite.

*Understanding of HTML, CSS, and basic web development principles.

*Knowledge of responsive and mobile-first design practices.

*Strong visual design skills including layout, typography, and color theory.

*Excellent communication and collaboration skills.



Key Skills

*User Interface (UI) Design

*User Experience (UX) Design

*Responsive Web Design

*Wireframing and Prototyping

*Graphic Design

*Attention to Detail

*Creative Problem-Solving



Benefits (optional section depending on company)

*Competitive salary

*Professional development opportunities

*Flexible or remote work options



***How to Apply***

1)Please attached or share a link to your resume. 

2)Please answer the follow questionaires below.

3)Provide examples of your work with a link or attachment



***Questionaire***

1)How many years of experience do you have in Web Design?

2)What are some things that you like about Web Design?

3)Do you have a target industry that you like to design for?

4)How do you work under pressure? For example; There is a website that needed to be built in less than a week, how do you manage that pressure and still be able to get the job done?

title: Experienced Shopify Plus Developer
description:
We’re a premium brand currently operating on Shopify Plus and preparing for a multi-store rollout across international markets. We’re looking for an experienced developer to lead development and optimisation across our storefronts — ensuring clean, bug-free code, site speed, and theme flexibility are prioritised throughout.



- Conduct a comprehensive audit of our existing Shopify Plus theme. Identify code inefficiencies, unused assets, structural issues, and speed bottlenecks

- Provide actionable recommendations to improve performance, maintainability, and flexibility

- Develop and deploy custom Shopify Plus theme using the latest version of Liquid and best practices (Online Store 2.0+)

- Execute a multi-store setup (e.g. AU, US, EU) with localisation, currency, and fulfilment considerations

- Write clean, maintainable code that’s speed-optimised and scalable

- Troubleshoot and eliminate bugs or bottlenecks across our current store

- Implement custom features and third-party app integrations with minimal impact on performance

- Ensure the theme remains easily customisable by our internal marketing and content teams



What We’re Looking For

- Proven experience developing Shopify Plus stores (multi-store or expansion stores a big bonus)

- Deep knowledge of Liquid, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Shopify theme architecture

- Strong understanding of performance optimisation and PageSpeed best practices

- Ability to write code that is well-documented and clean for future editing

- Familiarity with Shopify’s latest features, including Online Store 2.0 and custom sections

- Attention to detail and a high-quality, bug-free approach to development

- Excellent communication and availability to work to a set timeline



To apply please include:

- A short introduction about your experience with Shopify Plus

- Examples of custom themes or multi-store projects you’ve worked on

- Your availability and rates (hourly or project-based)

title: Adobe Graphic Designer (Photoshop,Illustrator & InDesign focus)
description:
Anyone graphic designer who only focus on what we need?



We are looking for a creative Adobe Designer with experience in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) to produce high-quality graphics/contents for signage and hardware displays. This role requires attention to detail, creativity, and the ability to translate concepts into visually appealing designs. 



Can do a job in EST time please. 

Just need a 2 monitors and Photoshop,Illustrator & InDesign installed.

Can start ASAP - no long waiting.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Turf Bros is a family owned premium lawn care and garden maintenance business in Perth, WA, focused on delivering stunning lawn transformations south of the river. We're growing our online presence and need a reliable offshore VA to help create engaging short form content that showcases our work. 



This is a flexible, part time role ongoing.



Key Tasks:



Manage social media (mainly Instagram,
, linkedin, tiktok & potentially youtube): Create/schedule posts, write captions/hashtags, engage followers, track basic performance.




munity groups: Posting, recording and tracking 
munity groups with spreadsheets for daily advertising to help us fill our schedule. 



Handle video content: Edit or compile raw job footage into longer highlights if needed, then use AI tools (e.g., Opus Clip, CapCut, Vizard.ai) to auto-generate Shorts/Reels/TikToks with captions, effects, and branding.

Upload/schedule the AI-generated shorts and other content across platforms.

Basic admin - light research for content ideas 







Requirements:



Experience with social media management and short-form video (Reels/TikToks/Shorts).

Familiar with AI video tools for repurposing long videos into clips (e.g., Opus Clip, CapCut, VEED, Klap. Experience with any is a plus; we'll guide on our preferred ones).

Proficient in CapCut/InShot or similar for minor tweaks, Canva for graphics, Google Workspace.

Strong English (written/spoken), proactive, detail-oriented, reliable deadlines.

Good internet, quiet setup for occasional Zoom/Slack.

Portfolio/examples of social posts or edited shorts required (lawn/outdoor content a bonus).



What We Offer:



Competitive offshore hourly rate 

Flexible schedule around your availability.

Grow with a local Aussie brand, see your content help attract more customers.



Send CV, portfolio/links to work, expected hourly rate, availability (hours/week + timezone), and why this fits you. We'll review quickly and may send a small test task.

title: Logistics Operations Assistant (Remote)
description:
About the Company

Lightyear Transportation & Logistics is a growing trucking and hauling company focused on construction and infrastructure projects. We coordinate hauling for materials such as gravel, asphalt, and aggregate while working with contractors, drivers, and vendors across the southeastern United States.

We are looking for a highly organized Logistics Operations Assistant who can help manage the operational workflow that keeps our trucks, invoices, and driver payments organized.

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structured work, tracking information, and keeping operations running smoothly.



Core Responsibilities

Operations Tracking

Maintain a log of completed loads and jobs

Track key details such as contractor, driver, material, and rate

Ensure load documentation is organized and accessible

Invoice Management

Create and send invoices to contractors or customers

Maintain an invoice tracking sheet

Monitor payment status

Follow up professionally on unpaid invoices

Driver Pay Coordination

Track driver assignments and rates

Calculate driver pay based on load information

Maintain a driver payment log

Prepare weekly payment summaries

Vendor & Partner Coordination

Communicate with mechanics, contractors, and vendors

Maintain a contact list of partners and service providers

Assist with scheduling operational items as needed

File & Documentation Management

Organize operational documents in shared folders

Maintain tracking spreadsheets

Document processes in Notion



Tools We Use

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

 and calendar

QuickBooks (light use)

Messaging tools (Slack or WhatsApp)

Notion for operations management



Ideal Candidate

We are looking for someone who is:

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Comfortable working with spreadsheets and tracking data

Experienced with invoicing and payment tracking

Able to communicate professionally with vendors and partners

Proactive and dependable

Comfortable handling operational workflows

Experience supporting logistics, trucking, dispatch, or operations teams is a strong plus.

title: Short form Video editor for FB/IG
description:
I am looking for a full time video editor that excels in short form video editing. this role must be experienced and have a good understanding in turning long form videos/podcasts into engaging short form videos. 



This role is specifically looking for experience and can not be considered if less than 2 years in the industry. examples of work is required.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (After Effects) — AI, Instagram/TikTok
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor (After Effects) — AI, Instagram/TikTok

SALARY: $1,100 USD/month

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver overlap (PST) for feedback



---



THE MISSION



Prismiera is a luxury jewelry brand with a short-form video series already producing cinematic content on YouTube — mythology, history, goddess archetypes, and Dark Academia aesthetics.



We need someone to own the Instagram and TikTok side.



This is NOT repurposing YouTube content into different aspect ratios. This is building platform-native content that makes a woman feel powerful in under 20 seconds. You'll create original short-form edits and cinematic skits using AI-generated footage, voiceovers, and atmospheric visuals — designed from the ground up for how Instagram and TikTok audiences actually consume.



The other half of this role: you'll be working with our AI-generated personas who serve as the visual anchor across our short-form content. You'll generate, composite, integrate, and stylize AI character visuals into edits that feel striking and intentional, not gimmicky. If the idea of building a visual identity around an AI persona excites you, keep reading!



---



THE STYLE



The content mix you'll produce:



65% VIBE & SCENARIO — The kind of reel a woman sends to her group chat with no caption because the vibe speaks for itself.



25% CINEMATIC SKITS — High-end, visually stunning executions of viral formats and dark humor. The premise can be slightly unhinged or ironic, but the visuals never break luxury. Think high-end perfume commercial meets TikTok audio trend. The Goddess is never the butt of the joke — she's the punchline, and she always wins.



10% SENSORY / EXPERIMENTAL — Layered, fast, loop-optimized. Visual overload with mythological texture. The algorithmic wildcard.



YES: Aspirational. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. Content that feels like a luxury car reel meets ancient mythology. Cinematic skits using our AI personas — high-production value, deadpan, surreal, or darkly ironic.



NO: CapCut presets. Generic motivational quote reels. Low-effort vlog-style acting. Slapstick comedy. Anything that looks like it was made in Canva. Anything that cheapens a demi-luxury product.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Create & Adapt: Produce original Instagram/TikTok-native content using AI-generated visuals, trending audio, and our brand's mythology. Some pieces you'll build from scratch. Others you'll adapt from assets in our YouTube production pipeline. Either way, you're not resizing — you're crafting content shaped for how each platform rewards engagement.



Cinematic Skits: Build short-form skits around our AI personas that use trending formats, dark humor, or deadpan irony — executed at a visual level that never drops below luxury. People share it for the joke, follow the page for the aesthetic.



AI Persona Integration: Composite and stylize our AI-generated characters into edits as a visual anchor. She's not a narrator in your content — she's the presence. The face the eye locks onto while mythology and music layers move around her.



AI Content Generation: You won't just receive AI assets — you'll create them. Using tools like Seedance 2.0 and Seedream, you'll generate goddess visuals, atmospheric environments, and character footage that feed directly into your edits. You're both the director and the editor.



Music-Sync Editing: Your cuts, transitions, and visual reveals are married to the beat. You understand rhythm as a storytelling tool. Swells, drops, silence, impact — all intentional.



Platform Instinct: You understand what Instagram rewards vs. what TikTok rewards. You know what gets saved on IG. You know what gets looped on TikTok. You design for those behaviors, not just for visual quality.



Instagram Packaging: Beyond the Reel itself — you contribute to grid cohesion, caption strategy, and Story sequencing. The profile should make someone think "I want to be part of this" within 2 seconds of landing.



Volume at Speed: Once your templates and aesthetic are locked, your turnaround per piece should be significantly faster than building from zero. We expect high output.



---



CORE REQUIREMENTS



After Effects (Mandatory). Compositing, layering, motion graphics, light/shadow matching. This is your primary tool. You build visual experiences, not just cuts.



Premiere Pro. For project handoffs and consistency with the rest of the team.



AI Generation Fluency. This is not optional. You'll be using frontier AI tools daily — not just editing AI output, but generating it. You'll learn to prompt, iterate, select, and refine AI-generated visuals as a core part of your production workflow. We provide paid accounts for all tools (Seedance 2.0, Seedream, and whatever launches next). What we need is someone who treats these tools as creative instruments, not novelties.



The Aesthetic Eye. You instinctively know the difference between aspirational and try-hard. Between elegant and overproduced. Between powerful and loud. Your edits make people feel something before they consciously understand what they're looking at.



Music & Rhythm. You've made edits where the music drives the visuals — AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits, whatever. You understand pacing as a weapon. You know what "the drop" means and you know when NOT to use it.



Loop Thinking. You design edits that reward rewatching. The cut that lands on beat, the detail you only catch the second time, the seamless loop point. You think in circles, not lines.



Strong English. Daily async communication — clear, direct, professional.



Reliable & Coachable. You hit deadlines or warn early. You take direct feedback and iterate fast. You flag problems with options, not excuses.



---



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, But We'll Notice)



- Color grading — pushing AI output and mixed footage into a consistent luxury palette

- Typography sense — text overlays that feel intentional and premium

- Sound design — SFX layering beyond just music (risers, hits, atmospheric texture)

- Carousel / static design for Instagram companion posts

- Understanding of Instagram analytics — saves, shares, completion rates, and what drives them

- Experience building visual identities for brands or personas on social media



---



WEEKLY OUTPUT



Ramp-up (first 2–3 weeks): 3–5 pieces as you learn the brand aesthetic, lock your AE templates, learn the AI generation tools, and calibrate with the team.



Steady state: 10–15 pieces per week across Instagram and TikTok — a mix of original productions and asset-based adaptations depending on the content calendar.



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production and visual effects — you own social media. Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run After Effects, Premiere Pro, and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



PAID TRIAL (Shortlisted Candidates)



Before any full-time commitment, we run a weekly paid trial. We provide real assets from our production pipeline, style references, and the AI persona visuals. You deliver content. Trial is compensated at $250 USD at the end of each week. If it's a mutual fit after 30 days, we transition to regular bi-weekly payments (before work).



This protects both sides — you see whether the work fits your strengths, we see whether the output fits our brand.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- Paid accounts for all frontier AI tools — Seedance 2.0, Seedream, and whatever launches next

- Creative ownership — you're defining how a luxury brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok from day one

- An AI persona to build around — not a hypothetical, an active visual identity you'll shape and evolve

- A role that evolves as the tools evolve — this job will look different in six months, and that's the point

- Clear briefs — asset libraries, mood references, and specific direction for every batch

- Direct feedback — specific, constructive notes on every edit

- A brand worth building — Prismiera launches soon. A second AI-native brand is incubating behind it. You're not joining a finished machine. You're helping build one.



---



COMPENSATION



$1,100 USD/month. Paid trial at $250 USD/week, transitioning to bi-weekly payments of $550 (before work) after 30 days.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic cover letter.

Use 7 apply points or more when applying.



Subject line: PRISMIERA SOCIAL — [Your Name]



Send the following (in this order):



1. The Vibe Test. Link to ONE edit you've made that is aspirational, aesthetic, or fashion-adjacent, or a skit that demonstrates platform-native virality instinct. Format doesn't matter. The feeling and execution does.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE edit where the music drives the visuals. Show us your beat-sync instinct. (Can overlap with #1 if one video demonstrates both.)



3. The Creative Instinct Test (3–5 sentences total). You're given a 45-second cinematic video about a queen who poisoned her entire court, a folder of our AI Goddess visuals, and a dark atmospheric beat. Pitch two reworks: (A) a 15-second Instagram Reel designed to get saved — tell us your audio choice, pacing, and what the first 2 seconds look like; and (B) a 15-second cinematic skit that uses dark or deadpan humor without losing the luxury feel.



4. AI Experience (1–2 sentences). What is your experience level with generative AI tools? If none, say so — we'll evaluate the rest on its own merits.



5. Hardware. Your PC specs: CPU / GPU / RAM. Plus your internet upload speed.



6. Turnaround Estimate. Given existing footage, a music track, and an established AE template — how long would a 15–20 second piece take you?



7. The Rewrite. Rewrite this sentence to sound dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."

title: NDIS Virtual Assistant
description:
NDIS Virtual Assistant



NDIS EXPERIENCE IS REQUIRED



Role Overview



The NDIS Virtual Assistant provides administrative, compliance, and operational support to ensure the smooth delivery of services within an NDIS provider organization. This role is responsible for maintaining accurate records, managing documentation, assisting with participant and worker compliance, and supporting internal processes such as timesheets, reporting, invoicing, and communication.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, and experienced in working with NDIS processes and compliance requirements. The Virtual Assistant will work closely with management, support coordinators, and support workers to ensure efficient operations and adherence to NDIS standards.



Key Responsibilities

1.
 and Communication Management



Monitor and review incoming
s daily.



Coordinate with the client or management on how to respond to
s initially and gradually manage responses independently.



Maintain professional communication with participants, workers, and external stakeholders.



Escalate important matters to management when necessary.



2. Meeting and Appointment Management



Maintain accurate records of meetings, appointments, and schedules as requested by the client.



Document meeting notes and ensure key action items are tracked and followed up.



3. Timesheet and Case Note Management



Review and approve participant timesheets daily.



Prepare weekly timesheet and case note reports for participants.



Ensure support workers complete case notes after each shift, summarizing activities in 2–3 sentences.



Monitor case notes for i
 or behavioral concerns and escalate when necessary.



4. Participant Compliance Management



Ensure that all participant records are complete and compliant with NDIS documentation requirements, including:



Participant Details Form



Participant Assessment Form



Consent Form



Acknowledgement Form



Service Agreement



Support Plan



Support Review Form (for participants receiving services longer than 6 months)



Home Visit Risk Assessment



Emergency and Disaster Management Plan



Activity-Based Risk Assessment



Personal Money and Property Form



Person-Centered Plan (to be completed within 60 days of onboarding)



Case Notes after each shift



I
 Reports (if applicable)



Complaint Forms (if applicable)



5. Worker Compliance Management



Ensure all support workers maintain complete and updated documentation including:



Payroll Details



100 Points Identification



Police Check



Working with Children Check



NDIS Worker Screening Check



Infection Control Certificate



NDIS Orientation Module



COVID-19 Vaccination Certificate



First Aid Certificate



CPR Certificate



Car Registration and Insurance (if applicable)



Relevant Disability Support Qualifications



Updated Resume



6. Record Keeping and Documentation



Maintain records of monthly management meetings and internal discussions.



Document staff supervisory meetings and worker interviews.



Track and maintain staff training records.



Take meeting minutes for scheduled meetings.



Maintain records of complaints, feedback, and internal communications.



7. Risk Management and Registers



Maintain and regularly update organizational registers including:



Risk Register



Worker Screening Register



I
 Register



Behavioral Concern Register



Conflict of Interest Register



8. Invoicing and Financial Administration



Generate invoices using Vertex360 software.



Support financial tracking and reporting processes.



Assist with integration of financial data into accounting systems such as Xero, MYOB, and other accounting platforms.



Required Skills and Experience



Previous experience in administrative or virtual assistant roles



Experience working with NDIS providers is highly preferred



Healthcare or disability services experience is an advantage



Strong understanding of documentation and compliance processes



Excellent organizational and time management skills



Strong attention to detail and ability to manage records accurately



Ability to handle confidential information professionally



Strong written and verbal communication skills



Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks efficiently



Preferred Software Experience



Experience with the following systems is preferred:



Vertex360



Xero



MYOB



Google Workspace



Microsoft Office



Compensation



Salary: PHP 30,000 per month



Full-time remote position



Opportunity to work with an NDIS provider supporting participants in Australia

title: Appointment Setter to make Calls
description:
We need a highly fluent english speaking person to call new leads that come in immediately. We need to be making calls within minutes of the leads coming in. We need someone who can work from 8am EST - 8pm EST during Monday - Friday. Your role will be you calling leads that get sent to you for our window replacement company. You will be in charge of calling leads when they come in and making phone calls on a daily basis trying to set appointments. 



We will pay you per appointment set. We get about 300 leads a month and typically on the LOW END a 50% set rate and on the high 80% set rate. We will pay $5 per appointment that gets set on the schedule. So that means your salary could be anywhere from $750-$1200 based on performance. 



We need someone outgoing, smart, responsible and willing to grow in the company

title: Social media sales representative
description:
Job Title: Social Media Sales Representative



Company: Gizmos & Gadgets

Location: Georgetown, Guyana

Job Type: Full-Time or Part-Time



Job Overview



Gizmos & Gadgets is looking for a motivated and customer-focused Social Media Sales Representative to manage customer inquiries across our social media platforms and convert them into sales.



The ideal candidate should be comfortable communicating online, knowledgeable about social media platforms, and capable of guiding customers through the purchasing process. This role plays an important part in turning online engagement into real sales.



Key Responsibilities

 • Respond promptly to customer inquiries on Instagram,
, WhatsApp, and other messaging platforms

 • Provide accurate information about product features, pricing, promotions, and availability

 • Guide customers through the purchase process and close sales

 • Recommend additional products and upsell where appropriate

 • Follow up with customers who expressed interest but did not complete a purchase

 • Monitor and respond to comments on social media posts

 • Maintain records of inquiries and confirmed orders

 • Stay updated on new products, promotions, and company policies



Requirements

 • Strong written communication and customer service skills

 • Sales-oriented mindset with the ability to convert inquiries into purchases

 • Familiarity with social media platforms and messaging tools

 • Ability to manage multiple conversations simultaneously

 • Organized and detail-oriented

 • Basic knowledge of consumer electronics is an asset



Preferred Experience

 • Previous experience in sales, customer service, or social media management

 • Retail or electronics sales experience is an advantage



Application Instructions



Interested candidates should submit their CV/Resume along with the following information:

 1. Requested Salary

 2. Availability: Full-Time or Part-Time

 3. Brief description of any experience in sales, customer service, or social media management



Applications should be submitted through this job platform.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: B2B Appointment Setter
description:
** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING **



Hey! I am Jordan, founder of a fast growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call with an A.I. Receptionist.



This is not a typical call center job where you are just a number. I am only looking to hire 2-3 people and work closely with my team.



Your only job is to source and call business owners and book them for a free consultation. The closing team does all the pitching, your only role is to get them to show-up!



SUPER IMPORTANT:

- I am ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):

- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this



COMPENSATION:

-$2/hour base

-$25 per attended show-up

- $100 per closed deal

- Monthly performance bonuses

- Callers can earn $400-$800 and that is for part time work.



HOURS:

- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 1:00 AM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:

- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, answer these 3 specific things:  #1: Tell us your specific B2B cold outreach experience #2: How many calls per day you made in your previous role #3: What is the most common objection you heard during cold calls and how did you respond to it

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected. We read each application and looking for a genuine person to reach out.

title: *IMMEDIATE HIRING* Virtual Assistant. Full-Time Opportunity
description:
Are you looking for job security, guaranteed full-time work and salary, top dollars & continually rewarded for work well done? Then this is the perfect job for you!



You'll only need to have the following to be successful with us:

- Computer literate and fast, reliable internet connection

- Hardworking and reliable

- Work autonomously and stay focused

title: Financial Operations Manager
description:
We are a fast-growing import and distribution business specializing in frozen meat and seafood in Metro Manila. Our model revolves around high-volume container transactions, structured procurement, and controlled capital deployment.



We are looking for a Financial Operations Manager to build and manage the financial backbone of the business. This person will work directly with leadership to ensure complete visibility into transactions, capital deployment, operational costs, and investor reporting.



This role is responsible for building financial systems from the ground up, creating operational dashboards, managing cash flow visibility, and producing clear reporting for internal management and investors.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, analytical, and capable of translating complex operations into clean financial reporting.



Key Responsibilities

Financial Systems & Reporting



• Build and maintain financial models for container transactions

• Track revenue, costs, margins, and profitability across shipments

• Develop operational dashboards and financial reporting systems

• Maintain detailed financial records and transaction documentation

• Create monthly and quarterly financial summaries



Operational Visibility



• Track container-level economics (cost, sale price, margin)

• Monitor logistics costs, storage fees, and distribution expenses

• Build spreadsheets that track the full lifecycle of each shipment

• Work with operations to ensure accurate data collection



Investor Reporting



• Prepare clear investor reports for funded containers

• Track capital deployment and profit distributions

• Produce regular financial updates for stakeholders

• Maintain documentation for transparency and compliance



Budgeting & Financial Planning



• Manage company budgets and expense tracking

• Monitor cash flow across procurement cycles

• Forecast capital requirements for upcoming shipments

• Support financial planning for growth and expansion



Required Skills



• Strong Excel / Google Sheets modeling skills

• Experience building financial dashboards and reports

• Ability to track operational data and translate it into financial insight

• Experience with financial forecasting and budgeting

• High attention to detail and strong analytical thinking



Bonus:



• Experience in logistics, import/export, or commodity trading

• Experience preparing investor reporting packages

• Knowledge of accounting systems (QuickBooks, Xero, etc.)



What Success Looks Like



• Clear financial visibility across all shipments and transactions

• Accurate container-level profit tracking

• Professional investor reporting delivered consistently

• Clean financial systems that support scaling the business



What this person will actually build for you



If you hire the right person, they will create:



Container Profit Tracker



Cost per container



Selling price



margin



investor return



Cash Flow Dashboard



capital deployed



capital returned



available capital



Operations Tracker



shipment timeline



arrival



sale status



Investor Reports



container performance



payout summaries



Budget + forecasting



This becomes the financial control center of your business.

title: Bookkeeper for HVAC, Plumbing and Electrical Companies
description:
We are a U.S.-based fractional CFO firm serving growing HVAC, plumbing, and electrical companies. We are hiring a strong bookkeeper to support our CFO work. This is not a full-charge role. You will not manage clients independently. Your job is to keep the books clean, accurate, and accrual-based so the CFO can provide high-level guidance.



This is an after-the-fact accounting role. Clean up, reconcile, document, and prepare reliable financials.



**Must Have Experience**



* 3+ years of U.S. bookkeeping or accounting experience

* Daily QuickBooks Online usage

* Strong accrual accounting knowledge

* Confident balance sheet reconciliations

* Payroll journal entries and allocations

* Clear understanding of COGS vs operating expenses

* Experience with HVAC, plumbing, or electrical companies required

* ServiceTitan experience is a strong bonus

* Experience supporting multiple clients inside a firm environment preferred

* Reliable high-speed internet



**What You’ll Do**



* Maintain clean accrual-based books in QuickBooks Online

* Reconcile bank and credit card accounts monthly

* Review and post payroll entries properly

* Keep the chart of accounts structured and consistent

* Identify errors, inconsistencies, and unusual activity

* Prepare financials for monthly CFO review



**Schedule**

Monday through Friday, East Coast USA business hours, non-negotiable.



**To Apply**



Submit:



* A resume link (Google Drive or Dropbox)

* Confirmation you can work East Coast hours

* Confirmation of 3+ years U.S. accounting experience

* Brief note describing your experience with HVAC, plumbing, or electrical clients



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Senior AWS Engineer – AWS Cost Optimization & Kubernetes
description:
Job Description:

About the Role

We're a blockchain/DeFi company running production infrastructure that's bleeding money unnecessarily. Our AWS bill is sitting at $4,500/month – and we know it shouldn't be anywhere near that. We need someone who can come in, audit the whole setup, and actually fix it. Not just give us a report that sits in a folder.



We've already been through a few candidates who talked a big game but couldn't execute. We're done with that. If you're the type who needs handholding or can't work independently, this isn't for you.





What You'll Actually Do

- Audit our entire AWS infrastructure and identify exactly where we're wasting money (we expect significant savings)

- Optimize our Kubernetes clusters – right-size nodes, fix resource requests/limits, implement autoscaling that actually works

- Implement cost controls: Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, spot instances where appropriate, and cleanup of orphaned resources

- Set up monitoring and alerts so costs don't creep back up without us knowing

- Document everything you do so the team can maintain it





Hard Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- 3+ years hands-on Kubernetes experience in production environments – EKS specifically preferred

- Deep AWS knowledge: EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, CloudWatch, Cost Explorer, Trusted Advisor

- Proven track record of actually reducing AWS costs (be ready to share numbers/percentages)

- Strong scripting skills (Python, Bash) for automation

- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform or CloudFormation (Terraform preferred)

- Self-starter who can take ownership and execute without constant oversight





!!!!CRITICAL: This Role Requires Surgical Precision

This is production infrastructure running live systems. Think of this like surgery – one wrong move can take everything down.

- NO cowboy moves. You don't delete, modify, or remove anything without a clear plan first.

- Every change must be planned out, documented, and confirmed with the CEO before execution.

- Extreme attention to detail. You double-check and triple-check before touching anything.

- If you're not 100% sure what something does, you ask first. You don't assume.

- Methodical execution only. We value careful and correct over fast and reckless.





Strong Plus

- Experience with blockchain/Web3 infrastructure

- Karpenter, Cluster Autoscaler, or KEDA experience

-  AWS certifications (Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer)

- Experience with FinOps tools (Kubecost, CloudHealth, 
)





What We Need In Your Application

Don't send a generic application. We will ignore it. Include:

- Specific examples of AWS cost optimization you've done – what was the setup, what did you change, what % did you save?

- Your Kubernetes experience – cluster sizes you've managed, scaling strategies you've implemented

- Your availability and timezone (we need someone who can overlap with US business hours for some calls)





Compensation & Structure

- $20-25/hour based on experience and proven results

- 20 hours/week to start – potential for more hours for the right person

- Fully remote

- Initial project: Comprehensive audit + implementation plan with clear cost reduction targets





If you're someone who can actually deliver results and not just talk about them – we want to hear from you. Show us what you've done.

title: Crypto BD Partner - $10,000+ Potential in 90 Days
description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!
