title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
***Please include your resume when submitting your application.***



Digital Reach is a global HubSpot Platinum Partner agency providing complete digital solutions across the cloud and the entire customer journey.



As a Digital Marketing Specialist, you will be instrumental in the successful execution, optimization, and analysis of our clients' digital marketing campaigns. This role is ideal for someone with 2-4 years of experience in paid ad management across search engine marketing (SEM), Meta, and LinkedIn and who thrives in a fast-paced agency environment. In this role, you’ll be collaborating with seasoned professionals and will work closely with your Marketing Consultant and Campaign Director.



You will assist in the analysis and optimization of accounts, provide strategic guidance, and contribute to budget allocation decisions. You will be a major contributor to sophisticated multi-channel marketing initiatives across platforms such as Meta, LinkedIn, Google, Bing, and OTT/CTV, where responsibilities will also include ensuring that all campaign assets are in place, coordinating with various tea
mbers to meet project deadlines, and maintaining comprehensive records of all campaign-related activities.



Role & Responsibilities

- Analyze campaigns at the pre-defined cadence, suggest optimizations, and ensure updates are documented appropriately. Continuously analyze campaign data, uncover insights, and translate them into recommendations to optimize performance.

- Offer strategic input and budget allocation suggestions.

- Collaborate with the Campaign Director to carry out campaign builds and optimizations. Ensure all campaign assets are implemented in-platform and prepared for final internal quality control (QC checks).

- Assist in preparing and updating client reporting decks in coordination with the Marketing Operations team and Marketing Consultant.

- Work with the Campaign Director to create and refine target audiences in collaboration with various vendors (eg. Bombora, Simplifi, etc.).

- Develop a strong conceptual understanding of each client’s business model, marketing objectives, and campaign strategy, and demonstrate the ability to shift between accounts with different goals (e.g., lead generation vs. brand awareness) while optimizing tactics accordingly.

- Manage campaign experiments, from setup to tracking results.

- Regularly monitor campaigns to ensure full-funnel execution post-launch.

- Check ad platforms at predefined cadences to ensure budget spending aligns with expectations and troubleshoot issues as needed.

- Facilitate communication between internal teams to ensure all deadlines are met, and campaign needs are addressed.

- Maintain clear documentation of optimizations, suggestions, and feedback.

- Troubleshoot and resolve platform errors and recommendations with the Campaign Director.



Candidates Must Have:

- 2-4 years of in-platform digital marketing optimization experience, preferably in an agency setting.

- Experience with LinkedIn, Meta, and DSP platforms, including proficiency in display ads.

- Experience working in HubSpot or similar marketing automation platforms.

- Familiarity with Google Ads and SEO/SEM principles.

- Experience with various marketing automation tasks, such as list building, workflow building, form building, etc.

- Experience with reporting and analysis tools, including building reports and presenting insights.

- Strong optimization skills and attention to detail.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Ability to multitask and manage multiple assignments in a fast-paced environment.

- Proven ability to work both independently and collaboratively.



Bonus Points If You Have: Agency experience.



This Position Reports To: Campaign Director



Working Hours: This is a remote-only position working US business hours. Applicants must be available to work either a graveyard shift (8:00 PM – 5:00 AM PH time) or a bridge shift (3:00 AM – 12:00 NN PH time).



You Should Know: This isn’t the place for everyone. You’ll have a lot of autonomy, but the expectations are high, the work is fast-paced, and the hats are many. We’re looking for people with grit who take ownership, see the big picture, and are always thinking about how we can do even better the next time.



Compensation and Benefits: Digital Reach offers a competitive salary for this role, depending on location and experience. You’ll also receive a benefits package which could include up to 6 weeks of PTO (including sick leave, holidays, and time off for vacation, etc.) depending on your location.



Timeline: Applicants who pass the initial screen can expect video screening questions and initial behavioral/cognitive testing within a week of submitting your application. We are hiring for this position for an immediate start but will adjust the timeline for the right candidate.



Additional Information: If you read this job description and think that you might be a good fit, even if you don’t meet all of the requirements, please go ahead and apply. We aim to create opportunities for marginalized populations and communities and are willing to train for this role.





Digital Reach provides equal employment opportunity to all employees and applicants without regard to race, religion, age, ancestry, gender, gender identity, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, veteran status, marital status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.





***Please include your resume when submitting your application.***

title: AP Lead
description:
AP LEAD

Position Overview

• Support and help oversee daily Accounts Payable operations.

• Serve as a key resource within the AP team while working closely with the AP Director.

• Ensure accurate and timely processing of invoices and payments across multiple entities.

• Ideal for an AP professional ready to take on increased responsibility and leadership within the

function.



Key Responsibilities

• Support day-to-day AP operations and ensure timely processing of invoices, credits, and payments.

• Act as a resource for AP processes, assisting with issue resolution and escalations.

• Review invoice coding, approvals, and documentation for accuracy and compliance.

• Assist with month-end close activities, including accruals, reconciliations, and reporting support.

• Maintain vendor relationships and respond to vendor inquiries professionally.

• Collaborate with internal departments to resolve discrepancies and improve workflows.

• Prepare documentation and assist with internal and external audit requests.

• Support process improvements, documentation, and internal control initiatives.

• Manage AP activity across multiple legal entities and locations.



Qualifications

• 2–4 years of Accounts Payable experience.

• Experience in Senior Living, healthcare, or real estate preferred.

• Experience supporting multi-entity or multi-location organizations preferred.

• Experience with AP or spend management systems (e.g., Ramp, Coupa, 
, Tipalti, SAP

Concur, NetSuite, SAP Ariba, AvidXchange, Yooz, Stampli, MineralTree).

• Strong understanding of AP workflows, best practices, and internal controls.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting systems.

• Strong attention to detail, organization, and time management skills.

• Ability to work independently while collaborating in a fast-paced environment.

title: Video Editor & Social Media Content Creator (Instagram / TikTok)
description:
MYO Total Wellness is a performance and recovery studio based in Utah that works with elite athletes, Olympic athletes, and high-performing individuals. Our focus is advanced bodywork, fascia science, and recovery technologies.



MYO Light is our red and near-infrared light therapy brand designed for recovery, performance, and longevity.



We are looking for a skilled video editor and social media content creator to help us create engaging content for Instagram and TikTok.



Role Overview

This role is primarily focused on editing videos and photos for social media. We will provide most of the ideas, direction, and caption copy.



You will help turn raw footage into clean, engaging content and assist with creating visual content that helps grow our social media presence.



Responsibilities



Edit short-form video content for:

• Instagram Reels

• TikTok

• YouTube Shorts (occasionally)



Add captions, subtitles, and clean edits to videos.



Edit and enhance photos for social media.



Create Instagram carousel posts when needed.



Turn raw footage into engaging social media content.



Assist with simple content ideas and suggestions to help improve engagement and growth.



Requirements



Strong video editing skills.



Experience editing short-form social media content.



Proficiency with tools such as:

• CapCut

• Adobe Premiere Pro

• Final Cut

• Canva

• or similar editing software



Basic photo editing skills.



Understanding of Instagram and TikTok content styles.



Good English communication.



Ability to follow direction and maintain a clean, professional brand style.



Compensation



$4 per hour



Schedule:

3–4 days per week

Approximately 3 hours per day



Potential to increase hours over time depending on performance.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:

 1. Examples of videos you have edited.

 2. Links to any social media accounts you have worked on.

 3. Examples of photo edits or carousel posts you have created.

 4. Start your application with the word “MYO” so we know you read the job description.

title: FT - Airbnb Guest Experience Specialist
description:
Job Title: Airbnb Guest Experience Specialist

Schedule: 8am - 5pm Monday - Friday (EST)

Hours: Full-time 45 Hours

Pay: $720 - $1,080 a month ($4/hr - $6/hr) USD



About Us:

Coastal Breeze Getaways is a premier short-term rental management company on Florida’s Gulf Coast, founded by a former electrical engineer who brings high-level precision and data-driven systems to the hospitality space. 



Because we are active investors ourselves, we operate with a unique edge: we treat every single property we manage with the exact same care and strategic oversight as our own assets. 



We pride ourselves on a transparent, family-oriented culture where hard work is deeply rewarded, making this the perfect home for a high-performer who wants to grow alongside a scalable, tech-forward business.





Preferred Languages:

* English (Fluent)

* Spanish (Highly Preferred) – Many of our guests speak Spanish, so the ability to communicate comfortably in Spanish by message or phone is a major advantage.



Responsibilities:

* Guest Experience (Core Frontline Responsibilities)

* Respond to all guest messages, booking inquiries, and issues via Guesty, OpenPhone,
, and social channels

* Maintain fast response times and professional communication with guests before, during, and after their stay

* Call guests directly when necessary to resolve urgent issues, clarify questions, or de-escalate concerns quickly

* Troubleshoot common guest issues such as check-in questions, lockouts, amenities concerns, or property questions

* De-escalate guest concerns professionally and resolve issues quickly to maintain exceptional guest experiences

* Coordinate late check-outs and early check-ins with guests, housekeeping, and maintenance staff

* Work cross-functionally with our local operations team to escalate urgent guest or maintenance needs in real time

* Offer thoughtful solutions that balance guest satisfaction with company policies

* Reach out to past guests for repeat booking opportunities and contact upcoming guests about stay extensions

* Review and respond to guest reviews using reputation management best practices and AI-assisted tools

* Submit and manage review disputes with OTAs (Airbnb, VRBO) when appropriate

* Update house manuals, digital guides, and listing descriptions when property updates occur

* Support guests pre-stay, during their stay, and post-stay to ensure a seamless experience

* Document systems and processes and help improve and automate workflows where possible



Accountability & Performance Metrics: Guest Experience

* Maintain response time under 15 minutes across communication platforms (Goal: Superhost / Preferred Partner status)

* Maintain 4.95+ average guest review rating across all listings

* Resolve urgent guest issues (lockouts, tech issues, access questions) within 5–10 minutes of report

* Track and report weekly guest feedback trends and suggest improvements to the property experience



Skills & Qualifications:

* At least 1 year of guest communication experience with Airbnb, VRBO, or other short-term rental platforms

* Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills

* Confident speaking with guests on the phone and comfortable making calls when issues arise

* Ability to remain calm and solution-focused when handling guest concerns

* Excellent written English and guest communication skills

* Ability to make independent decisions while following established processes

* Strong attention to detail and organizational skills: Secret Code CBGAGES310

* Comfortable using Guesty, WhatsApp, OpenPhone, Google Drive, and remote collaboration tools

* Self-starter who takes ownership of tasks and identifies ways to improve operations

* Spanish speaking ability is a strong plus and helpful when assisting Spanish-speaking guests

* Bonus: Experience with Notion



Salary:

* Position & Length: Contractor (Remote) 1-Year (12 months) 

* Rate of Pay: $4-$6 USD (depending on experience)

* Scheduled Hours Minimum: 45 hours (Must Track Hours) 

* Scheduled Hours Maximum: 50 hours (Anything above needs approval) 

* Agreed Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM Eastern Time

* Pay Schedule: Monthly via Wise or preferred method

With the submission of hours worked

title: Senior Amazon PPC & Performance Advertising Manager
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a Senior Amazon PPC & Performance Advertising Manager to own and scale paid media across a growing multi-brand Amazon portfolio.



Amazon Ads is the core of this role. You will lead strategy and execution across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands (including Video), Sponsored Display, and stay ahead of Amazon’s newest ad formats and betas.

Google Ads and TikTok Ads support Amazon growth and are important secondary channels.



This is a hands-on senior role for someone who has already managed and scaled Amazon advertising at a high level and wants full ownership of performance.



What You’ll Be Responsible For Amazon Advertising (Primary Focus)

Own end-to-end Amazon PPC strategy and execution

Manage Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Brands Video, and Sponsored Display

Build scalable, structured campaigns across multiple ASINs and brands

title: Marketing Coordinator (Operations & Growth Specialist)
description:
Remote (Philippines-Based)

 Full-Time | 40 Hours per Week | Monday–Friday

 Supporting Australian Market



About the Business

We are a fast-growing, experience-led online marketplace operating in the luxury transport and events space across Australia, with expansion planned internationally.

Our platform connects customers with premium experience providers for weddings, luxury events, tourism experiences and brand activations.

We are not a traditional rental company.

We are an experience-first brand focused on partnerships, distribution and emotional 
nts — not paid ads.

We are now hiring a Marketing Coordinator (Operations & Growth Specialist) to help execute and scale our growth strategy.

This is not a basic social media VA role.

This is a growth and operations hybrid role inside a scaling marketplace.



Role Overview

You will work directly with the Founder and sit at the intersection of:

• Partnerships

 • Marketplace supply growth

 • Booking conversion

 • Social & content coordination

 • Systems & process building

Your role is to help turn growth into a structured, repeatable system.



Core Responsibilities

1. Partnership & Distribution Growth (Primary Focus)

We grow primarily through partnerships — not ads.

You will:

- Research and build curated partner databases (weddings, luxury brands, tourism, media)

- Conduct warm, relationship-based outreach

- Manage follow-ups and nurture relationships

- Help structure referral and partner programs

- Track partnership-generated bookings

- Support B2B growth initiatives





Industries include:

- Wedding planners & venues

- Experiential & PR agencies

- Tourism operators & luxury hotels

- Automotive & lifestyle media

- Corporate & B2B partners



2. Marketplace Growth & Onboarding Support

- Follow up partially onboarded providers

- Guide providers through documentation and compliance

- Assist with listing activation

- Maintain strong partner relationships

- Improve supply-side responsiveness



3. Booking Conversion & Customer Operations

- Follow up approved but unpaid bookings

- Manage inbound enquiries 
 & chat)

- Improve conversion through proactive communication

- Support premium experience-based offerings

- Capture customer feedback to refine positioning



4. Content & Social Coordination

Social media is used as evidence and social proof — not just presence.

You will:

- Collect user-generated content from providers

- Repurpose footage into short-form content

- Use Canva templates to maintain brand consistency

- Publish across Instagram, TikTok & YouTube

- Support blog creation for SEO

- Turn bookings into ongoing content assets



5. Systems & Process Development

Growth must be structured.



You will:

- Document workflows and outreach systems

- Build SOPs to support scale

- Track KPIs (partners onboarded, bookings generated, conversion rates)

- Identify automation opportunities

- Help reduce founder involvement in day-to-day operations



Required Skills & Experience

You must have:

- 3+ years experience in marketing, operations or growth

- Experience working with AU clients a real bonus

- Strong written and spoken English

- Confidence with outreach and follow-up communication

- CRM experience (HubSpot or similar)

- Canva proficiency

- High attention to detail

- Strong organisational skills

- Ability to work autonomously



Nice to Have

- Marketplace/platform experience

- Wedding, tourism or luxury brand exposure

- SEO/blog writing experience

- Partnership marketing experience

- SOP documentation experience

- Light video editing skills



The Mindset We Want

You think long-term.

You build relationships, not transactions.

title: Digital Marketing Support Specialist NZ
description:

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working independently, and has strong social media and digital marketing experience. You will play a key role in supporting our marketing initiatives across New Zealand, Australia, and the United States with varied daily tasks, working closely with the existing Marketing team.

, and LinkedIn

title: L2 Tech Support Engineer
description:
Dear Technology Lover!

We're a small (but VERY efficient) 20-year-old MSP based in Arizona.

As a small company. we're VERY employee-focused, and believe that our tea
mbers are our MOST IMPORTANT ASSET!



Here are some of the things you can expect from working with us:

• Ongoing (monthly) manager review and feedback- you should never guess where you are "standing" and what you, AND THE COMPANY, can do better!

• Paid certifications- we will pay for your courses, and tests and allocate time during business hours to help you achieve your desired goals

• Paid Time Off- it's important to us that you are happy, healthy, and have a work-life balance!

• Bonuses- when the company wins- you win!

• Raises- As we grow, we believe you should as well. We have to stay competitive as an employer to retain our awesome employees!

• Opportunities to grow- In our industry, we can't be on "cruise control"... We need to push our tea
mbers to stay ahead of the technology curve. Help you continually to sharpen your skills with a focus on your career aspirations.

• Paid sick days- We understand life happens. We don't want you to feel that you have to drag yourself to work sick if your body tells you to relax...



You're the right fit if you:

• LOVE learning, working with, and experimenting with new technology

• Get excited when you save someone's day and provide great service

• Are a hard-working fun person, and see yourself being in the IT industry for the foreseeable future

• Want to work in a GROWING environment, with STABLE income, Bonuses, and a great attitude!

• Want the opportunity to advance and learn more!



Some of the responsibilities that your position will include are:

Helpdesk (mostly escalations, but some basic if needed), cyber security related tasks/ audits, cloud hosting and virtualization (HyperV, SonicWall, VPN), MS365 management and automation, BCDR (Axcient), networking (Unifi, Sonicwall), IT projects, Servers maintenance (Windows only), scripts creation, testing new technology and other tasks related to IT.



IMPORTANT:

This position requires AT LEAST 2 years of MSP experience and at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory, or lead role. 100% clean background check, highly organized, technologically savvy, and can work diligently with little 
veral hiring steps will take place to verify the above requirements, including reference checking, employment verification, technical testing, and more.



Minimum technical level that you will need to be able to pass a test on:

• Explaining to a non-technical person what the "cloud" is

• Consulting with a new client on what BCDR solution you would recommend to an SMB, and why

• Explaining what the differences are between traditional anti-virus and XDR

• Creating a new Virtual Machine on Hyper-V host, from an ISO file located on a different computer on the network.

• Explaining the differences and commonalities between SharePoint and OneDrive.

• Creating an Intune policy that will install Firefox on an Azure-joined VM, and make Firefox the default browser, with the specific home page we'll provide to you during the test.

• Several other situational and technical questions.

• CCNA certificate candidates preferred but not required.



MORE DETAILS:

• A PRE-EMPLOYMENT BACKGROUND CHECK is performed (at our expense). You must have 100% clean background check. Please do not apply if you don't have 100% clean background check.

• Personality is KEY for us. We are looking for an easy-going, yet professional, friendly and HONEST person.

• You will be working from home. This means you must have a quiet work environment and no excessive background noise.

• FAST AND RELIABLE INTERNET SERVICE IS REQUIRED With at least 100Mbps download speed  20+ Mbps upload speed.

• As part of this position requirement, you must have a computer that will be used exclusively for your work with us. This means we will be installing our security software on that computer, will remove admin rights from you, and monitor/ control it for security and compliance reasons. In return, we will pay you additional “rent” fees, on top of your salary, in the amount of several hundred dollars. Details about this “rental” will be discussed during your second interview. There are minimum requirements that your computer must have, in order to be employed with us. You must have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 minimum 9th gen processor (preferably a newer one) with 16 GB RAM or more or Ryzen 5/7 (MUST include TPM support) as well as Windows 11 OS.

• You must have recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more.

• We evaluate/ review employees monthly and provide consistent feedback.

• We offer raises and bonuses according to performance, certifications, attitude, and customer reviews twice/ year.

• Your manager (our IT director) will create a roadmap for your "KPIs" and certifications track. We always push our team to earn certifications and additional knowledge – even allowing “disconnect study time” during business hours!

• On-call rotation (after-hours) for a week at a time, once every 4-5 weeks. It's VERY rare that we get calls after-hours (the average is only twice/ year!).

• We're closed on major US holidays, and at the completion of the first 3 months of employment, you'll qualify for paid holidays.

• Work hours are Mon-Fri at 8 am till 5:30 pm (UTC-07:00 , MST, Arizona time zone)

• Every 4 to 5 weeks, you'll be working 1/2 day on a Saturday (project work/catch-up work) and get 1/2 day off the week after

• Mandatory 1-hour lunch and additional breaks (as you need those) throughout the day.

• Further details and information will be discussed with qualified candidates.



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED:

• REQUIRED: Relevant minimum 2 YEARS experience working for an MSP

• REQUIRED: With AT LEAST 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role.

• REQUIRED: Microsoft Azure AD/ M365 experience

• REQUIRED: Experience working with an RMM and PSA software (DATTO preferred)

• Preferred: Cyber Security education/experience

• Preferred: Hyper-V experience



Other tools we use:

Barracuda DNS filter, AutoElevate, Cylance, Infocyte, Syxsense, IT Glue, SonicWall, Unifi, and more



HOW TO APPLY?



send an
 to 
 with the subject line "L2 Tech Support - Feb 2026".



In your
 body, you MUST include the following, and ONLY the following please:

- An attachment of your resume in PDF format

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you have a 100% clean background with no criminal history.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you understand the business hours (MST\ Arizona time zone.



Answer the following questions:

1. How many years of experience do you have working in an MSP company? Name of the MSP company/s you worked with.

2. Do you have at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role?

3. Do you have experience working with RMM and PSA software? What applications did you use?

4. Do you have experience working with Virtualization, servers, GPO, TCP/IP, hyper-v/vmware, conditional access, Intune, and Scripting such as PowerShell?

5. Have you recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more? What time zone and when?

6. Are you okay with the computer requirements and the rental arrangement described in the job details?

7. Do you have an internet speed of at least 100Mbps download speed and  20+ upload speed?



- No other information/cover letter or attachments should be included, besides a simple salutation and signature if so desired.



NOTE- Please do NOT apply using other methods besides the above. Any applicants who reach out to us via phone, social media, or any method other than the instructions above will automatically be disqualified.

Only those who followed the above instructions will be contacted within up to 2 business days, with further instructions.





We're looking forward to having you join our family!

title: Medical Billing Support Specialist (EXPERIENCE REQUIRED)
description:
IF YOU APPLY AND DO NOT READ BELOW YOU WILL BE BLACKLISTED FROM ALL FUTURE OPPORTUNITIES!



We are hiring a serious, reliable, and detail-oriented Medical Billing Support Specialist to work alongside our Senior Medical Billing Specialist and support daily U.S. medical billing operations.



This is a support role, but it is still an important role. We need someone who is organized, honest, productive, and able to follow instructions carefully while maintaining accuracy throughout the day. You will help keep claims moving, accounts updated, and billing tasks on track.



We are not looking for someone who is careless, lazy, dishonest, constantly distracted, slow without reason, or looking to get paid for doing the bare minimum. We are not interested in fake experience, fake productivity, copy-paste updates, or people who say they understand billing but cannot actually perform the work. If you waste time, hide mistakes, disappear during work hours, or need constant chasing, this role is not for you.



We want someone dependable, coachable, professional, and serious about doing the job correctly. You do not need to be the final decision-maker, but you do need to be someone who can support the billing process without creating confusion, delays, or extra cleanup for others.



You will work under the guidance of a senior tea
mber, so this role is best for someone with medical billing support experience who wants a stable opportunity and is willing to earn trust through consistency, accuracy, honesty, and results.



What You Will Do

	•	Support daily U.S. medical billing tasks with accuracy and consistency

	•	Check claim status and update account notes clearly and correctly

	•	Follow up on unpaid or pending claims as assigned

	•	Review basic claim issues and escalate higher-level problems appropriately

	•	Verify insurance, patient, or claim-related information when needed

	•	Help organize billing records, attachments, and account documentation

	•	Maintain accurate work logs and provide truthful updates

	•	Follow instructions carefully and complete assigned tasks on time

	•	Help keep billing workflows organized, current, and moving forward



What We Need

	•	Experience in medical billing support, claims follow-up, or related billing/admin work is preferred

	•	Strong attention to detail and ability to stay organized

	•	Ability to follow instructions and complete repetitive work accurately

	•	Honest, dependable, and consistent work habits

	•	Good communication and clear written updates

	•	Willingness to learn, improve, and accept feedback

	•	Ability to stay productive without constant supervision

	•	Respect for deadlines, accuracy, and accountability



Integrity and Accountability Matter Here

This is a trust-based role. We do not tolerate:

	•	lying

	•	fake updates

	•	fake experience

	•	hiding mistakes

	•	poor follow-through

	•	time wasting

	•	sloppy work

	•	disappearing during work hours

	•	pretending to be busy while producing little or no results



Mistakes can be corrected. Dishonesty cannot. If you are not truthful, dependable, and accountable, you will not be a fit for this role.



What We Offer

This is a long-term opportunity for the right person. We reward reliability, honesty, effort, and consistent performance. Tea
mbers who prove their value may have opportunities for:

	•	yearly raises based on performance

	•	bonus or commission opportunities based on results

	•	personal days

	•	long-term growth within the company



Compensation

	•	$3.00 per hour base

	•	Opportunity for performance-based incentives

	•	Yearly raise opportunities

	•	Personal days



Required With Application

To be considered, include a short answer to the question below in your own words:



Screening Question:

When checking claim status, what details should always be reviewed and documented before moving the account forward or escalating the issue?



Important

Generic, vague, copied, or AI-style answers will be rejected. If your experience is not real, your work habits are poor, or your communication is unreliable, do not apply.



Final Note

We are looking for someone who is honest, teachable, productive, and serious about their work. If you are dependable, accurate, respectful of the job, and willing to earn trust through performance, we would like to hear from you. If you cut corners, waste time, or think you can get away with doing less than what is expected, do not apply.

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
ABOUT US



Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 5:00am–2:00pm PST

title: Growth Strategist / Direct Response Marketing Brain
description:
This is NOT a social media manager role.

If you only schedule posts, make Canva graphics, or “run ads” without thinking  this is not for you.



I’m looking for a cold, calculated, strategic marketing operator who understands buyer psychology, revenue strategy, funnels, webinars, and conversions.



This role is about thinking, not just executing.



ABOUT THE BRAND



We operate in the financial education / consulting space.

Our audience is emotional, hesitant, motivated, and needs clarity + confidence to buy.



Your job is to help us:

 • Think smarter

 • Sell cleaner

 • Convert better

 • Scale faster



WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY DO



You will be responsible for strategy, not busy work.



Core Responsibilities:

 • Break down buyer psychology (why people hesitate, stall, or ghost)

 • Create offer positioning & messaging that converts

 • Build and refine funnels (cold ? warm ? buyer)

 • Design high-converting webinar frameworks

 • Develop ad angles, hooks, and messaging

 • Analyze what’s working, what’s not, and pivot fast

 • Generate new campaign ideas weekly

 • Help structure launches, promos, and evergreen sales



You’ll work closely with execution teams, but you are the brain behind the moves.



YOU ARE A FIT IF YOU:

 • Think in psychology, pressure, timing, and leverage

 • Can explain why something will convert — not just “let’s test it”

 • Understand urgency, authority, scarcity, and emotional buying

 • Can map a funnel without guessing

 • Aren’t afraid to challenge ideas (respectfully)

 • Care about revenue, not vanity metrics



?



YOU ARE NOT A FIT IF YOU:

 • Only do content calendars

 • Only “run ads” without strategy

 • Can’t explain buyer objections

 • Need constant direction

 • Avoid accountability

 • Hate numbers or feedback



?



EXPERIENCE WE VALUE (NOT REQUIRED, BUT A PLUS):

 • Direct response marketing

 • Webinar sales strategy

 • Info products, consulting, or high-trust offers

 • Scaling $200–$2K offers

 • Financial, coaching, or education industries



Results > credentials.



?



COMPENSATION

 • Monthly retainer

 • Performance bonuses tied to revenue

 • Trial period (2–4 weeks) before long-term commitment



We pay for brains, not hours.

title: Social Media Manager Sales
description:
Role Overview



We’re looking for a sales-focused Social Media Manager who turns comment engagement into revenue. Your entire job is to go into the ad comments, follow up with interested users, nurture leads, and convert them into product sales. You will be the voice replying to comments, sending follow-ups through DMs, and guiding willing prospects into paid programs, products, and mentorships we offer.



Daily Responsibilities



? Monitor and reply to comments from active ads

? Follow up with users requesting help, guidance, or packages

? Convert comment conversations into real sales

? Send DMs, build rapport, and move leads into purchase decisions

? Track outreach, leads, and comment-to-sale conversions

? Work closely with sales and marketing team to hit targets

? Know our product suite and confidently sell from it

? Maintain honest, clear, and professional communication



You’ll Be Selling From



???? Multiple digital products

???? eBooks & guides

???? Mentorship programs

???? Consulting toolkits

???? Academy & community offers

…and more. You’ll have a large catalog to sell from, meaning more opportunities for commissions, incentives, and earnings.



Compensation Structure



???? Base hourly pay (DOE) + Sales commissions per conversion

???? Earn extra for hitting weekly/monthly sales goals

???? Bonuses, incentives, and internal perks for consistent closers



Requirements

 • Excellent English communication (written)

 • Comfortable in comment marketing and sales conversion

 • Experience in social media engagement with a sales mindset

 • Can work independently and close leads without being pushy or flirty

 • Familiar with remote tracking and reporting

 • Knows DM follow-up funnels

 • Availability for 20–30 hours per week



Nice-to-Have (but not required)

 • Credit/consulting niche experience

 • CRM or lead tracking background

 • Experience working with digital product brands



Who This Isn’t For



? Someone who only wants to post content and avoid selling

? Someone who can’t handle high comment volume

? Someone uncomfortable converting conversations into sales



Who This Is For



? Someone who likes engagement

? Someone who wants to earn more by closing leads

? Someone who wants a flexible role that rewards performance

? Someone who wants to make money while doing it



?



How to Apply



Send your resume + a short message answering these:

 1. Have you worked in a sales-driven social media role before?

 2. Are you comfortable replying to ad comments and converting them into purchases?

 3. How many hours per week can you realistically commit?

 4. When can you start?

title: Virtual Assistant – Business Credit Specialist
description:
Type: Contract / Remote (U.S.-based preferred, but open to experienced international candidates)



About the Role:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant who specializes exclusively in business credit building. This is not a personal credit repair role. You will be responsible for helping our clients structure and develop their business credit profile from the ground up, ensuring it is properly set up to obtain funding, credit lines, and trade accounts.



Responsibilities:

 • Assist with proper LLC structuring and ensure business compliance with state and federal guidelines.

 • Guide clients through obtaining and setting up EINs, D-U-N-S Numbers, and business credit reporting profiles.

 • Set up and manage Net 30 accounts and vendor lines of credit to build strong payment history.

 • Recommend and apply for business credit cards and funding opportunities as appropriate.

 • Monitor and update business credit profiles on bureaus such as Experian Business, Equifax Business, and Dun & Bradstreet.

 • Advise clients on maintaining good standing and compliance for continued credit growth.

 • Track and report progress, ensuring clients hit milestones in their business credit journey.

 • Stay up to date on business credit building strategies, requirements, and best practices.



Requirements:

 • Proven experience in building business credit profiles from start to finish (references or portfolio required).

 • Strong understanding of LLC creation, compliance, and proper business structuring.

 • Direct experience working with Net 30 vendors, business credit bureaus, and funding institutions.

 • Familiarity with tools, platforms, and systems used to monitor and manage business credit.

 • Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and manage multiple client profiles simultaneously.

 • Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.



Preferred Skills:

 • Experience in consulting or mentoring small business owners on credit and funding.

 • Knowledge of alternative funding options and credit-building strategies.

 • Background in business consulting, finance, or credit repair (business-specific).



Compensation:

 • Competitive, based on experience and proven results.

 • Performance-based bonuses possible.



To Apply:

Send your resume, details of your business credit experience, and examples of results you’ve achieved for past clients. Applicants without proven business credit experience will not be considered.

title: A/R Follow-Up Assistant (EXPERIENCE REQUIRED)
description:
IF YOU APPLY AND DO NOT READ BELOW YOU WILL BE BLACKLISTED FROM ALL FUTURE OPPORTUNITIES!



We are hiring a serious, dependable, and detail-oriented A/R Follow-Up Assistant to help work unpaid claims, follow up with payers, update accounts accurately, and support the collections process.



This is a support role for someone who can stay organized, follow instructions, communicate clearly, and consistently move assigned accounts forward. We are looking for someone who is honest, productive, coachable, and willing to do the work properly every day.



This role is not for someone who is lazy, careless, dishonest, slow without reason, or looking to do the bare minimum. We are not interested in fake experience, fake productivity, weak follow-up, vague updates, or people who need to be chased all day to get work done. If you waste time, hide mistakes, disappear during work hours, or touch accounts without making real progress, this role is not for you.



You will be responsible for following up on unpaid claims, checking claim status, updating notes clearly, documenting payer responses, and helping keep aging accounts moving. You do not need to be the final decision-maker on every account, but you do need to be reliable, accurate, and able to complete follow-up work without creating more problems for the team.



You will work under direction, but you must still be able to stay productive, stay focused, and handle your assigned tasks with consistency and accountability.



What You Will Do

 • Follow up on unpaid and pending claims

 • Contact payers to check claim status and request updates

 • Document account activity clearly, accurately, and completely

 • Update claim notes and account details in a timely manner

 • Identify claims that need escalation and route them appropriately

 • Help work aging accounts and keep follow-up queues current

 • Maintain steady daily productivity and accurate reporting

 • Follow instructions carefully and complete assigned work on time



What We Need

 • Experience in medical billing follow-up, claims follow-up, collections support, or related work is preferred

 • Strong attention to detail and accurate documentation habits

 • Ability to stay organized and manage repetitive tasks without losing focus

 • Honest, dependable, and able to follow instructions well

 • Good communication and clear written updates

 • Willingness to learn and improve

 • Ability to stay productive without constant supervision

 • Respect for deadlines, accountability, and work quality



Integrity and Accountability Matter Here

This is a trust-based role. We do not tolerate:

 • lying

 • fake updates

 • fake productivity

 • hiding mistakes

 • weak follow-through

 • poor documentation

 • time wasting

 • disappearing during work hours

 • pretending to work without producing results



Mistakes can be corrected. Dishonesty cannot. If you are not truthful, dependable, and accountable, you will not be a fit for this role.



What We Offer

This is a long-term opportunity for the right person. We reward reliability, honesty, consistency, and performance. Tea
mbers who prove their value may have opportunities for:

 • yearly raises based on performance

 • bonus or commission opportunities based on results

 • personal days

 • long-term growth within the company



Compensation

 • $3.00 per hour base

 • Opportunity for performance-based incentives

 • Yearly raise opportunities

 • Personal days



Required With Application

To be considered, answer the screening question below in your own words:



Screening Question:

When following up on an unpaid claim, what details should always be checked and documented before ending the call or updating the account?



Important

Generic, vague, copied, or AI-style answers will be rejected. If your work habits are poor, your communication is unreliable, or your follow-up experience is not real, do not apply.



Final Note

We are looking for someone who is honest, organized, productive, and serious about their work. If you can follow through, communicate clearly, and help move unpaid claims forward with consistency and accuracy, we want to hear from you. If you cut corners, waste time, or think you can get away with doing the minimum, do not apply.

title: Recruitment Support
description:
Job Title: Recruitment Support

Company: Ploomo



Location: Fully remote (Philippines) supporting a Melbourne, Australia team

Compensation: $8.50 AUD per hour + $400 AUD quarterly retention bonus



Summary



You’re the kind of person who feels calmer when the system is tidy, the next step is clear, and nothing is left hanging.



You’re comfortable talking to people on the phone, screening candidates, confirming details, and making sure everyone knows what happens next. At the same time, you enjoy the operational side of the work: updating systems, logging notes, sending follow-ups, and keeping the workflow accurate.



This role is a mix of candidate communication and structured coordination. You will spend time speaking with candidates while also maintaining the systems that keep our hiring campaigns moving.



Your job is simple in principle: keep the candidate pipeline moving and keep the system honest.



Working Hours



This role supports hiring campaigns across Australia and Europe, so availability across two daily windows is required.



As a base expectation, candidates should generally be available during:



7:00am – 11:00am Philippines time (Australia coverage)

4:00pm – 7:00pm Philippines time (Europe morning coverage)



These windows allow candidate calls, follow-ups, and hiring coordination to happen in real time across time zones.



There is some flexibility around exact hours with prior communication and agreement, as long as coverage across the Australia and Europe windows is maintained.



Minimum commitment is 25 hours per week, with the option to work up to full-time hours depending on workload and performance.



Is This You?



You naturally close loops. If something needs a follow-up, confirmation, or update, you handle it without needing reminders.



You’re comfortable spending time on the phone speaking with candidates and running screening calls.



You like systems and structure. Updating records, logging notes, and maintaining clean workflows gives you satisfaction.



You prefer clear processes and steady execution rather than chaotic work environments.



What’s in it for you



A stable remote role with a clear operational lane where your contribution is visible and valued.



Skill development in recruitment operations, candidate screening, and hiring workflows.



Strong remuneration and stability.



Work that rewards consistency. Reliability, clean records, and proactive communication are recognised and relied upon.



What you'll do



Conduct candidate screening calls to confirm experience, interest, and alignment with open roles.



Follow up with candidates to confirm availability, schedule interviews, and communicate next steps.



Maintain candidate records and workflow stages in the Ploomo portal so the system reflects reality.



Send assessments, collect candidate responses, and ensure progress through the hiring process.



Prepare candidate notes and summaries for internal recruiters and clients.



Coordinate communication between candidates, recruiters, and hiring managers.



Escalate blockers early so hiring campaigns keep moving.



Who we're looking for



Years of experience is less important than how you work and communicate.



Must-Haves



Comfortable spending significant time on the phone speaking with candidates.



Strong spoken and written English with clear, neutral communication.



Proven experience in admin, coordination, recruiting support, customer service, or operations.



Strong attention to detail and discipline with maintaining systems.



Ability to manage multiple tasks and follow-ups at the same time.



Availability to work split shifts covering AU and EU hours (example windows 7–11am and 4–7pm Philippines time).



Reliable internet connection and a quiet home working environment for phone calls.



Experience working in structured, process-driven roles where follow-through mattered.



Nice-to-Haves



Experience supporting recruitment processes or candidate coordination.



Familiarity with ATS or CRM systems.



Experience posting jobs or managing hiring workflows.



Experience working remotely with structured processes and service expectations.



About Ploomo



Ploomo helps organisations hire better by combining clear success profiles, structured assessments, and a hiring system that keeps campaigns visible and accountable.



We believe great hiring is not just judgement. It is process executed consistently and well.



Our team values clear communication, dependable follow-through, and raising issues early rather than explaining them later.



How to Apply



To confirm you have read this job description carefully, please include the word “Pipeline” as the first word in your reflection answer.



Go to this link to complete your application: 



It is not a test and there are no right answers.



Once we review your responses, we will contact candidates who show strong alignment to organise the next conversation.

title: Marketing & Growth Operations
description:
OVERVIEW



We are seeking a capable Marketing & Growth Operations Superstar to support the execution of digital marketing, content and ecommerce initiatives across several growing ventures.



This is a hands-on role working directly with the business owner. Strategy and direction will be developed collaboratively, with this role responsible for implementing, managing and improving marketing activity across campaigns, content, websites and digital platforms.



The position requires a strong marketing generalist operator who is comfortable executing across multiple areas including digital advertising, ecommerce management, SEO, content development and marketing operations. This is not a virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone with demonstrated experience working in a similar marketing execution role, either in-house or within an agency environment supporting Australian clients.



You should be confident working independently, taking ownership of execution and delivering work to a high standard, while also being open to learning the frameworks, systems and processes used within the business. 



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

These are some of the key responsibilities:



Digital Marketing Execution

• Managing and supporting campaigns across Meta, Google and LinkedIn

• Setting up campaigns, audiences, creatives and tracking

• Monitoring campaign performance and assisting with optimisation

• Implementing campaign changes and ensuring campaigns are executed correctly



Content Research & Development

• Researching and writing marketing content for websites, blogs, eDMs and campaigns

• Preparing structured content for social media and
 communications

• Supporting authority-building content and marketing resources

• Maintaining consistent tone, language and formatting across content for multiple businesses



Ecommerce & Website Management

• Managing website and ecommerce content within platforms such as Shopify

• Supporting complex product uploads and catalogue improvements

• Implementing on-page / off-page SEO improvements across products, pages and articles

• Ensuring website content remains accurate, structured and optimised



Marketing Operations & Project Support

• Preparing campaign briefs and coordinating marketing assets

• Converting ideas and working notes into structured documents or marketing materials

• Supporting the creation of internal resources, presentations and training materials

• Maintaining organised digital assets and marketing documentation



IDEAL EXPERIENCE

We are looking for someone with proven experience executing digital marketing activity across multiple channels, combined with exposure to ecommerce environments and broader marketing execution.



Key capabilities include:



• Managing paid advertising campaigns across Meta, Google Ads and LinkedIn

• Executing SEO activities, including keyword research, on-page optimisation and backlink development

• Managing ecommerce product catalogues, including product setup, categorisation, taxonomy and data integrity

• Developing and refining marketing content for websites, blog articles and campaigns



While AI tools will be used within this role, the successful candidate must already understand the structure and reasoning behind marketing execution, rather than simply generating outputs. This role requires someone who has performed these tasks before and understands the fundamentals behind the work, not someone learning platforms or marketing logic for the first time.



Additional attributes



• Exceptional spoken and written English

• High attention to detail and strong organisational skills

• Ability to work independently and take ownership of execution

• Comfortable managing multiple projects and priorities simultaneously

• Adaptable and able to move between different projects and tasks seamlessly

• A high performer who wants to contribute, learn and grow

• Interested in being part of a small but fast-growing business and collaborative team



Please note that graphic design is not part of this role. A full-time designer works alongside this position to produce required creative assets.



WORKING ARRANGEMENT & BENEFITS

You will be employed via an Employer of Record with standard Philippines employment benefits, and additional bonuses in line with personal and company achievement. 



• Full-time position (40 hours per week)

• Work from home

• Australian daytime working hours

• Salary range: 70,000 – 80,000 PHP per month 



ABOUT THE BUSINESS

You will work directly alongside a female founder who operates multiple ventures and consults to other businesses in areas including marketing, franchising and technology. (see profile: 
)



The team currently includes staff across operations, sales, finance and design, with tea
mbers located in both Australia and Cebu. The businesses are in a strong growth phase and this role contributes directly to the execution of marketing and growth initiatives across the portfolio.



TO APPLY



Please submit:



• Your resume and cover letter outlining your relevant experience

• Examples of campaigns, content or websites you have worked on

• Confirmation that you are able to work Australian business hours and have computer and set up for WFH



Please include the letters OFC in your application and note the location you are based in please. A short video introduction explaining your experience and interest in the role will be highly regarded.

title: Flexible Reddit Task (Content Reposting)
description:
We’re looking for someone to help repost relevant discussions to a career and work-related subreddit.



What you’ll do:

   * remotework

   * RemoteJobs

   * workfromhome

2. Repost the discussion to our subreddit



Important rules:

1. Only repost text posts with 10+ comments

2. No hiring posts

3. No “for hire” posts

4. No product promotion

5. Post must be at least 24 hours old, no more than 3 days old

1. Post 6-8 posts per day

2. Leave at least 20 minutes between posts



Time required:

1. About 10–20 minutes per day

2. Fully flexible schedule



Requirements:

2. Careful and responsible posting behavior

3. Must be able to avoid spam and bans



Pay:

To apply, please include:

1. How long you’ve been using Reddit

2. Link to the Reddit account you will use

3. Links to 3 posts from the subreddits listed above that meets all the important rules



This is a small, flexible task, not a full-time job.

title: Inbox Manager/Appointment setting (cold email)
description:

) — Remote

xxx is a B2B cold outbound agency. We build and run

s per month. We handle the systems, the copy, and the pipeline.

Competitive hourly rate based on experience

title: Accounting Supervisor
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW:

SimpleKeep is a modern US-based accounting company that values our team and creates a fun, dynamic work environment. Our goal is to provide exceptional accounting services to our clients while fostering a positive and supportive team culture. We are a remote team that leverages the latest technology to work together efficiently and effectively.



We're a great company to work for, and a small team, so you'll be able to come in and really have an impact on the way we do business. We're growing, and we’re looking to add an experienced person to our team.



POSITION OVERVIEW:

We’re seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Accounting Supervisor with proficiency in QuickBooks and Xero to join our growing remote team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in accounting, a passion for mentoring and developing staff, and a desire to work in a dynamic and supportive team environment. This is a remote position with flexible work hours.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Supervision and Leadership:

- Manage and oversee daily accounting operations, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger.

- Mentor and provide guidance to junior accountants and other tea
mbers.

- Conduct performance evaluations and provide feedback to staff.

- Develop and maintain accounting policies and procedures.

2. Financial Reporting:

- Oversee the preparation and analysis of financial statements.

- Ensure timely and accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.

- Provide financial analysis and insights to clients.

3. Bookkeeping and Reconciliation

- Ensure accurate and timely recording of financial transactions.

- Oversee bank reconciliations, accounts payable, and accounts receivable processes.

- Ensure accurate and timely month-end and year-end close processes.

- Prepare financial statements and other financial reports.

4. Budgeting and Forecasting:

- Lead the preparation of budgets and financial forecasts.

- Monitor budget performance and report variances.

5. Tax Compliance:

- Supervise the preparation and filing of tax returns.

- Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local tax regulations.

6. Software Utilization:

- Oversee the use of QuickBooks and Xero for all accounting functions.

- Ensure data integrity and accuracy within these systems.

7. Audit and Compliance:

- Ensure compliance with internal financial and accounting policies and procedures.

- Coordinate and support internal and external audits.

8. Communication:

- Communicate effectively with clients, vendors, and financial institutions.

- Provide clear and concise reports and updates to senior management.

- Ensure excellent English communication within the team and with stakeholders.

- Provide exceptional customer service to clients.

- Collaborate with other departments to streamline processes and improve efficiency.



QUALIFICATIONS:

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

- CPA certification preferred.

- Minimum of 5 years of accounting experience, with at least 2 years in a supervisory role.

- Proficiency in QuickBooks and Xero is mandatory.

- Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting.

- Excellent organizational and time-management skills.

- Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks.

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

- Experience in managing remote teams and working with US clients.

- Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other accounting software.

- Efficient, personable, adaptable, and organized.



WORK ENVIRONMENT:

This is a remote position; candidates must have a reliable internet connection and a dedicated workspace.



BENEFITS:

- Competitive salary and benefits package.

- Flexible work hours and remote work environment.

- Opportunities for growth and advancement.

- A supportive team culture that values work-life balance and employee satisfaction.

- Health card benefit after 9 months of employment.



WORKING SCHEDULE: Tuesday-Saturday 3am-12nn Manila Time



APPLICATION INSTRUCTION:

After you're done reading through the post, if you're ready to apply for the position, please send an
 to 
 sending your
, please be sure to:

- Attach your resume.

- Include a summary of your experience.

title: HubSpot Landing Page Designer / Builder
description:
HubSpot Landing Page Designer / Builder



About the Role:



SaaS Launch is looking to hire someone who can build a landing page inside HubSpot that closely matches a reference page we already have.



This should be a straightforward, execution-focused role for someone who is already experienced with HubSpot landing pages, has a good eye for layout and responsiveness, and can recreate a clean, high-converting page quickly and accurately.



We want someone who can move fast, follow direction well, and deliver a polished result without overcomplicating the build.



Responsibilities:

- Build a landing page in HubSpot based on a provided reference/example

- Match the overall structure, layout, spacing, and design feel as closely as possible

- Ensure the page is mobile responsive and clean across devices

- Add and format text, buttons, sections, forms, and images as needed

- Make sure the page is easy to edit and update later inside HubSpot

- Follow branding and content instructions provided by the team

- Communicate clearly and provide updates on progress



Requirements:

- Experience building landing pages in HubSpot

- Strong understanding of page layout, visual hierarchy, and responsive design

- Ability to closely recreate a reference page while working within HubSpot’s builder

- Good attention to detail

- Able to work quickly and meet deadlines

- Strong communication and reliability



Nice to Have:

- Experience with conversion-focused landing pages

- Basic understanding of CRO / UX best practices

- Experience working with SaaS, agency, or B2B brands



What Success Looks Like:

- The landing page is built accurately inside HubSpot

- It closely matches the provided reference

- It looks polished on desktop and mobile

- It is delivered quickly with minimal revisions



Compensation:

This is a project-based role.

title: Data Entry + Webinar Moderator (Long Term)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail oriented Virtual Assistant to support our team with data entry, webinar moderation, and administrative tasks.



This is not a passive VA role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership of systems, pays attention to details, and notices problems before being told.



If you are organized, dependable, and comfortable working during a specific weekly time window, this can become a long term position.



Core Responsibilities



Data Entry



A major part of this role involves entering payment processing data into organized Google Excel spreadsheets.



Accuracy is extremely important. Information must be entered correctly and consistently.



Webinar Moderation



Every Sunday we host a live webinar.



During the webinar you will moderate the chat, assist attendees when needed, and help keep things organized behind the scenes.



Required Working Hours



Sunday

8:00 PM to 11:00 PM Eastern Standard Time



Philippine Time

Monday 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM PHT



You must be available for this entire time block every week. This is a strict requirement.



Payment Processing Support



You will assist with organizing documentation related to payment disputes and chargebacks and help maintain clear records for our team.



Miscellaneous Administrative Tasks



Occasionally you will assist with small operational tasks such as organizing spreadsheets, updating records, and basic administrative support.



Requirements



Previous data entry experience

Strong attention to detail

Comfortable using Excel or Google Sheets

Reliable internet connection

Strong written English

Ability to follow instructions carefully

Must be dependable and consistent with schedule



Bonus Skills (not required)



Experience moderating webinars or online events

Experience with payment processors or dispute handling

Administrative assistant experience



Application Instructions



To make sure applicants read the entire job description, please follow the steps below.



Start your application with the phrase

“I pay attention to details.”



Create the following small table and paste it in your application exactly like this:



Name |
 | Payment Amount | Status

John Smith | john
.com

 | $297 | Completed

Sarah Cruz | sarah
.com

 | $97 | Pending



Record a short 30 second Loom video introducing yourself and explaining your data entry experience. Include the Loom link in your application.



Confirm that you can work every Sunday 8 PM to 11 PM EST (Monday 8 AM to 11 AM PHT).



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Account Executive
description:
Account Executive

You close. You build. You own your book of business — and you're proud of it.

 

About the Role

This isn't a role for someone who waits for leads to land in their lap. As an Account Executive at 
, you're the tip of the spear — you prospect, you pitch, you negotiate, and you close. You'll be handling high-stakes conversations with procurement teams and business owners who need reliable global sourcing partners, and you'll be the person who turns those conversations into signed contracts. Once a deal is done, you don't hand it off and move on — you're the quarterback of the client relationship, connecting them to our product sourcing and logistics teams to make sure delivery on what you promised.



This role comes with a competitive base pay plus commissions on every deal you close. The upside is real — and so is the accountability.



What You'll Be Doing



Business Development & Prospecting

•        Build your own pipeline — you don't wait for marketing to feed you leads (though they'll help)

•        Identify, qualify, and pursue new business opportunities across industries that rely on bulk product sourcing

•        Partner with the Sales & Marketing Manager and Marketing team on targeted lead generation campaigns — but you know how to hunt independently too

•        Attend industry events, networking opportunities, and trade shows as needed



High-Level Negotiation & Deal Closing

•        Lead pricing negotiations for bulk orders, long-term contracts, and recurring procurement deals

•        Develop and present tailored sourcing proposals and pricing strategies that work for both the client and the company.

•        Own the process from first contact through to contract signature — you're not handing this off mid-way

•        Navigate complex procurement cycles with multiple stakeholders without losing 
ntum



Client Relationship Management

•        Serve as the primary point of contact for your clients from contract signing onward

•        Act as the liaison between clients and our product sourcing and logistics teams — you translate client needs into actionable briefs and make sure execution doesn't drop the ball

•        Proactively manage expectations, flag delays or issues before they become problems, and always show up with solutions

•        Build long-term relationships that drive repeat business, upsells, and referrals



Quota & Performance

•        Hit monthly and quarterly revenue quotas — this is non-negotiable

•        Maintain an accurate and updated pipeline in the CRM at all times

•        Provide regular forecasting and deal updates to the Sales & Marketing Manager



You're a Great Fit If You...

•        Have 3+ years of B2B sales experience — ideally in trading, wholesale, procurement, logistics, or a related field

•        Know how to negotiate without burning bridges — you're firm, fair, and smart about it

•        Are self-driven and take full accountability for your pipeline and results

•        Can confidently engage C-suite and senior procurement stakeholders

•        Are comfortable with ambiguity — you figure things out, you don't wait to be told

•        Have strong communication and follow-through — clients trust you because you do what you say

•        Know your way around a CRM and keep your pipeline accurate



Nice to Have

•        Experience in global sourcing, China procurement, or import/export sales

•        Existing network in industries such as retail, manufacturing, FMCG, construction, or e-commerce

•        Familiarity with freight, logistics, and supply chain basics

•        Experience closing deals in the $50K–$500K+ range



What We Offer

•        Competitive base salary — we respect your time and experience

•        Commission on every deal you close — no cap, no politics, just results

•        A real product to sell: end-to-end global sourcing that genuinely helps businesses cut costs and source smarter

•        A lean, fast-moving team where your wins are visible and celebrated

•        Room to grow — as we scale, the people who built the business will be first in line for bigger opportunities

title: Someone who can skip trace and generate leads
description:
About Us:

Summit Refund Partners, is a dynamic and innovative company committed to delivering exceptional services to our clients. We specialize in auditing government agencies for overages billing for the people of that state and county. As we continue to grow, we are seeking a detail-oriented and motivated Lead Generation and Skip Tracing Specialist to join our team.

Job Description:

As a Lead Generation and Skip Tracing Specialist, you will play a crucial role in identifying and qualifying potential leads, as well as locating individuals for various purposes. You will utilize your research skills, attention to detail, and persistence to support our sales and operations teams. Your efforts will directly contribute to our company’s success by ensuring we have a robust pipeline of qualified leads and accurate information on individuals.

Key Responsibilities:

Conduct comprehensive research to generate and qualify leads across various industries.

Utilize advanced search techniques, databases, and tools to locate individuals for skip tracing purposes.

Develop and implement effective lead generation strategies to meet company targets.

Maintain and update lead databases with accurate and relevant information.

Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to ensure seamless lead handoff and follow-up.

Analyze and report on lead generation and skip tracing metrics to optimize processes.

Stay up-to-date with industry trends, tools, and best practices for lead generation and skip tracing.

Requirements:

Proven experience in lead generation and/or skip tracing.

Strong research and analytical skills with attention to detail.

Proficiency in using lead generation tools, databases, and CRM systems.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.

Strong organizational and time management skills.

Familiarity with relevant legal and ethical guidelines for skip tracing.

Preferred Qualifications:

Experience is preferred in Lead Generation and Skip Tracing

Knowledge of advanced search techniques and tools (e.g., LexisNexis, TLOxp, Been Verified etc.).

Previous experience working in a sales or marketing environment.

What We Offer:

Competitive salary and benefits package.

Opportunities for professional growth and development.

A collaborative and supportive work environment.

Flexible working arrangements.

How to Apply:

If you are a motivated and detail-oriented professional with a passion for lead generation and skip tracing, we want to hear from you! Please send your resume and a cover letter detailing your relevant experience to 
 with the subject line “Lead Generation and Skip Tracing Specialist Application – [Your Name]

Summit Refund Partners is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Job Title: Facebook Ad Launcher (NOT a Media Buyer)
description:
Job Title:
 Ad Launcher (NOT a Media Buyer)

Location: Remote

Type: Part-Time 7 days a week around 1 to 2 hours a day



About Us:

Clark and Campbell is a fast-growing fashion dropshipping brand focused on womens clothing women in Canada and US. We’re known for vibrant colors, flattering fits, and outstanding customer experience. As we grow, we’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented
 Ad Launcher to help us execute ad campaigns efficiently — this is not a media buying or strategy role, but purely a launch and setup role.



Role Overview:

You’ll be responsible for launching
 ads using provided copy, creatives, and targeting instructions. Your main job is to follow our proven launch systems inside Meta Ads Manager, mainly CBO campaigns with speed and precision.



Responsibilities:

Set up CBO campaigns and Advantage+ shopping campaigns inside Meta Ads Manager.



Duplicate and launch ad sets and creatives following step-by-step instructions.



Input correct copy, primary text, headlines, creatives (images/videos), and UTM tracking.



Launch new product test campaigns consistently and on time.



Maintain structured naming conventions for campaigns, ad sets, and ads.



Provide screenshots or Loom videos to confirm completion of daily tasks.



Available 6 to 7 days a week for quick, accurate and reliable ad launches.



Bonus Responsibilities (a big plus if you have experience with this):

Fill in scaling sheets and ROAS sheets in Google Sheets.



Assist with data entry and performance tracking for active campaigns.



Requirements:

Prior experience launching
 Meta ads (no media buying or creative strategy needed).



Confidence using Meta Ads Manager (Campaign, Ad Set, and Ad level setup).



Familiarity with Advantage+ campaigns is a big plus.



Detail-oriented and able to follow strict SOPs without deviation.



Excellent communication and fast response times.



Must work securely, handle ad accounts with care, and follow privacy guidelines.



Must be serious, reliable, and respect deadlines at all times.



Experience with Google Sheets, Slack, and Loom is preferred.



Available 7 days a week, even for short task check-ins.



Let us know also if you have experience filling in data sheets such as sales, cpc, BER, ROAS etc.



What We Offer:

Fully remote and flexible working hours.
