title: E-Commerce and Traffic specialists
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Shopify Web Designer and Growth Specialist who can build and optimize a high-converting e-commerce experience while also driving organic traffic and social media growth.



This is not just a design role. We are looking for someone who understands conversion-focused web design, SEO strategy, GEO optimization, and social media traffic generation.



We want you to design, optimize, and grow an e-commerce ecosystem that consistently attracts and converts customers.



Key Responsibilities

Shopify Website Design & Optimization



Design and maintain a modern, high-converting Shopify storefront



Improve site speed, mobile responsiveness, and UX/UI



Optimize product pages, collections, and navigation for conversions



Implement landing pages for campaigns and promotions



SEO & GEO Optimization



Conduct keyword research and SEO audits



Optimize site structure, metadata, and product pages for search visibility



Implement local and geographic SEO strategies (GEO targeting)



Improve Google indexing and organic rankings



Social Media Growth & Traffic



Develop strategies to increase traffic from social media platforms



Optimize content and landing pages to convert social traffic into sales



Collaborate on content strategy and audience growth



Conversion Optimization



Analyze website behavior and improve conversion rates



Optimize funnels from traffic to purchase



Implement A/B testing and performance tracking



Required Skills



Shopify Development & Design



Strong experience with Shopify themes and customization



Understanding of UX/UI best practices for e-commerce



Ability to create visually compelling, conversion-focused layouts



SEO Expertise



Experience with on-page and technical SEO



Knowledge of keyword research tools



Understanding of search engine ranking factors



GEO Optimization



Experience implementing geographic targeting strategies



Knowledge of local SEO optimization techniques



Social Media Traffic Generation



Experience growing traffic from platforms like Instagram,
, and TikTok



Understanding of social traffic conversion funnels



Preferred Experience



Candidates with the following experience will stand out:



Shopify design for fashion or lifestyle brands



Experience scaling direct-to-consumer brands



Experience integrating analytics and tracking tools



Performance Expectations



Within the first 90 days, you will:



Improve the overall Shopify site design and user experience



Implement SEO and GEO improvements



Increase organic traffic and social traffic flow



Help improve website conversion performance



AI Image generation for products. 



Compensation



Competitive hourly or project-based pay



Opportunity for long-term collaboration



Performance bonuses tied to traffic and growth improvements



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



Understands both design and growth strategy



Can build a website that is visually strong and conversion-focused



Knows how to increase traffic organically



Stays updated on e-commerce and search trends



How to Apply



Please include:



Links to Shopify websites you have designed



Examples of SEO or traffic growth results



Any social media growth campaigns you have managed



Tools and platforms you specialize in



We are looking for someone who can help build not just a website, but a powerful digital presence that drives consistent traffic and sales.

title: Cold Calling Sales Manager (Part-Time / Full-Time Opportunity)
description:
We are hiring a motivated and confident Cold Calling Sales Manager to join our team.

Our company specializes in professional photo and video coverage for B2B events, including conferences, commercial events, and forums. 



This is a part-time to full-time opportunity for someone who is proactive, persistent, and comfortable speaking with people. Working hours begin at 10:00 AM EST.



Responsibilities:

Research potential clients and find contact information

Make a high volume of outbound cold calls

Introduce our company’s photo and video services

Generate interest and identify potential business opportunities

Follow up with prospects and keep communication organized

Help grow the company through consistent outreach



Requirements:

Strong English communication skills

Confidence speaking on the phone

Previous sales or cold calling experience is a plus

Self-motivated, organized, and results-driven

Ability to work independently



What we offer:

An interesting and growing project

Part-time to full-time opportunity

Base pay plus commission

Growth potential for the right candidate



How to apply:

Please send your resume along with a 1-minute video introducing yourself, explaining why this position interests you, and sharing any relevant experience you have.

Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Prior Authorization Specialist
description:
We are looking for a Prior Authorization specialist to join our team in a virtual capacity. This role requires excellent interpersonal skills, attention to detail, high energy, and proficiency in English. In this role, you will check prior auths for approvals or denials, Process approved prior authorizations, follow up with clients and providers to obtain medical records, ans submit appeals for denied prior authorizations.

Reliable internet connection (minimum 150 Mbps)

High level of professionalism and organization

120 hours of accrued PTO each year.

9 paid us holidays each year



To apply:

 your PDF resume and a short video introducing yourself to 
 with the subject line: ACM Prior Authorization Position

title: Certified Public Accountant (CPA) - REMOTE
description:
We are a US-based custom manufacturing company, and we are looking for dedicated and loyal individuals that can contribute to our goals. We are looking for individuals who Embodies Our Core Values, Serve Others and Own It!



We are looking for Certified Public Accountants!



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze, organize, update financial records.

- Perform regular, detailed audits to ensure accuracy in financial documents, expenditures, and investments.

- Perform daily reconciliation of credit card, bank accounts, cash accounts, spending accounts, etc.

- Setup financial accounts as needed.

- Oversee ledger reconciliation and manage accounts payable/receivables.

- Liaise with Tax Accountants to track tax payments and returns.

- Monitor bookkeeping activities regularly.

- Keep company financial information confidential.

- Ensure vendor accounts are kept up to date for the entire organization.

- Inventory Management

- China Purchase Management



Qualifications:

- Excellent FLUENT English verbal and written communication.

- Candidate must possess at least Bachelor’s/College Degree in relevant field.

- Proven work experience as a Certified Public Accountant (CPA).

- Understanding of Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP).

- Preferably experienced accounting/finance employees specializing in US Accounting System.

- Familiarity with accounting applications, modules, and financial statements.

- Motivation to exceed expectations while working independently

- Friendly, fast learner who can adapt to change and have a “can-do” attitude

- Proficient computer skills in Microsoft Office, Outlook, Google, Internet Explorer, Microsoft Teams, etc.



System Requirements:

- Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

- Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

- Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

- Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

- REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

- REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording



***We’re picky. You must be smart, savvy, strategic, fun, and ready to learn fast and work hard. If you’re up for the challenge, we want to hear from you!

title: Sales Representative
description:
We are a US-based custom manufacturing company, and we are looking for dedicated and loyal individuals that can contribute to our goals. We are looking for individuals who Embody Our Core Values, Serve Others and Own It!



We are looking for Sales Professionals!



Key Responsibilities:

- Identify and generate sales leads through prospecting, website inquiries, databases, cold-calling, and other promotional strategies.

- Schedule and conduct virtual meetings and presentations with potential clients.

- Develop and deliver compelling sales presentations on company products and services.

- Maintain accurate records of sales activities, prospects, and customer interactions in the company CRM.

- Track customer reorders and follow up to ensure continued satisfaction.

- Communicate customer and prospect product pain points to appropriate departments.

- Maintain a well-developed pipeline of prospects.

- Collaborate with internal teams to address customer pain points and improve offerings.

- Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with customers and prospect.

- Consistently meet or exceed sales quotas and performance targets.



Qualifications:

- Fluent in English (both verbal and written) with excellent communication skills.

- Proven success in sales, with a strong track record of meeting or exceeding quotas.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision while maintaining high productivity.

- Strong relationship-building and negotiation skills.

- Self-motivated with a results-oriented mindset and a proactive approach.

- Friendly, fast learner who can adapt to change and have a “can-do” attitude

- Tech-savvy, with proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Suite, CRM software, and virtual communication tools (e.g., Microsoft Teams, Zoom).



System Requirements:

- Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

- Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

- Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

- Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

- REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

- REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording



***We’re picky. You must be smart, savvy, strategic, fun, and ready to learn fast and work hard. If you’re up for the challenge, we want to hear from you!

title: AI Course Producer (HeyGen) — Create 7+ Hour Trade Training Courses (Ongoing, Pay Per Course)
description:
Niksi is building a library of high-quality training courses for skilled trades (roofing, plumbing, electrical, drywall, concrete, and more). We’re hiring a course producer to create complete, long-form courses (7+ hours each) using HeyGen and our licensed/authorized founder avatar and voice.



If you’re great at structuring lessons, writing clear scripts, and producing professional videos fast — this is ongoing work with a steady pipeline of new courses.



What You’ll Do



Build a full course outline (modules + lessons) from our topic list



Write lesson scripts that are simple, clear, and easy to follow



Produce lesson videos in HeyGen using our provided assets (avatar/voice/branding)



Package the course for upload (organized files + links + outline)



Deliverables (Per Course)



7+ hours of completed video lessons (broken into modules/lessons)



Course outline + lesson list



Final scripts for every lesson



Captions/subtitles enabled when available



Clean folder structure + shareable links (ready to publish)



Timeline



15 days per course (from kickoff to final delivery)



Payment



Fixed price per course (please include your price in your application)



This is ongoing — if the first course meets quality, we will assign the next course immediately.



Required Skills



Experience creating online courses (trade, technical, business, or training content)



Strong script writing and lesson structuring



Comfortable producing videos using AI tools (HeyGen or similar)



Reliable delivery and communication (hit deadlines, handle feedback)



Nice to Have



Experience with trade education (construction, contractor training, real estate trades)



Instructional design background (clear learning objectives + quizzes/checkpoints)



Basic editing sense (pacing, clarity, and consistency)



How to Apply



Please send:



Your fixed price for a 7+ hour course (and what’s included)



1–2 examples of the best course/content you’ve produced (links)



Your HeyGen experience (or similar tools)



Confirm you can deliver within 15 days



Your availability to start this week

title: Lead Video Editor — Long-Term Creative Role
description:
Who I'm looking for



My go-to editor for everything. I run multiple content channels and a marketing agency — you'll be the production backbone across all of it. I'm not looking for someone to execute tasks. I'm looking for someone who thinks about why content performs, stays sharp on tools, and grows into the role over time.



What you'll be editing



YouTube long-form — two channels: AI/business content (clean, polished, talking-head) and gaming content (high energy, fast-paced, gaming culture)

Short-form — Reels and TikToks repurposed from long-form across both channels

Ad content — short UGC-style video ads for a marketing agency client

Community clips — highlight cuts for an online community platform

Different tones, different formats. You need to be comfortable switching between them.



What the right person looks like



Edits with metrics in mind — hooks, retention curves, pattern interrupts, pacing that holds attention past the drop-off points

Uses AI tools actively in their workflow — not someone learning them, someone already using them

Understands gaming content and gaming culture — you watch it, you know what lands

Knows short-form instincts — what clip works, what hook to lead with, how to format for vertical

Owns the output — delivers publish-ready, not "here's a draft"

Communicates clearly, doesn't need chasing

title: Shopify Product Specialist (with Data Scraping Experience)
description:
APPLY USING LINK BELOW ONLY - APPLICATIONS WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED OTHERWISE.







Blue Leaf Bathware is a premium Australian retailer specialising in designer bathroom products — including vanities, tapware, toilets, and freestanding baths — from brands such as Caroma, Fienza, ADP, and Parisi.

We’re growing fast and expanding our online product range. We’re looking for a Shopify Product Specialist with strong data scraping and product upload skills to help us streamline and scale our product catalogue.



Your Responsibilities



Scrape product information and images from supplier websites (e.g. product name, description, specs, prices, WELS/WaterMark certifications).



Organise and clean product data in Google Sheets / Excel.



Upload and optimise product listings in Shopify, ensuring accuracy and consistent formatting.



Rename and resize product images, ensuring clear file organisation.



Cross-check data for accuracy and duplicates.



Work collaboratively with the marketing and operations teams to maintain a high-quality catalogue.

title: Customer Success Assistant
description:
*KINDLY READ THE INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY BEFORE YOU APPLY.*



EJF is a well established & a rapidly growing real estate property management company in the District of Columbia is seeking to hire a responsible, dynamic, organized, detail oriented, and reliable Client Success Virtual Assistant to join our fun & hard working team.



Job purpose :

The Client Success Assistant supports the Director of Client Success by ensuring smooth operations across multiple communities, with a particular focus on monitoring at-risk properties and assisting with transitions, meetings, and success plans. This role involves close coordination with internal teams and community boards to deliver top-tier client satisfaction.



Duties and responsibilities:

- Monitor and Update the Watchlist Tracker.

- Assist in the Creation and Execution of Client Success Plans.

- Monitor Community Manager Transitions.

- Attend Board Meetings and Check-Ins.

- Coordinate the Execution of the 90-Day Transition Plan.

- Assist in Post-Mortem Exit Analysis.

- Creation of Playbooks and Resource Materials.

- Follow-Up with Internal Teams.

- Assist in Resolving Client Issues.

- Assist in Process Improvement and Documentation.

- Monitor Progress on Success Plans and Transitions.

- Support in Tracking Metrics and Reporting.

• Contribute to Departmental Initiatives.

• Other duties that may be assigned from time to time.



Qualifications :

- Property Management Experience preferred but not required

- Client Relation Management

- Customer Service

- Interpersonal Skills

- Technical proficiency

- Client-Centric Approach

- Data Analysis and Reporting



If you have the experience, and if this opportunity interests you, here is how to apply:

1. Please check out website: 

2. Send an
 attachment of your updated resume in PDF format (NO LINKS, please).

3. Send a link to of your video recording introducing yourself, an overview of your experience, and why are you looking for new opportunities.

3. Please indicate that you're comfortable with $6 USD per hour.

4. Kindly send your application to 
 the subject line, kindly indicate the position Client Success Assistant - your name.



*Applicants who will not follow instructions will be automatically rejected without notice.

* Shortlisted applicants will be contacted by
 for interview scheduling.



Looking forward to working with you!

title: B2B Appointment Setter
description:
Overview



Location: Remote Position

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Mountain Time (MT)

Employment Type: Full-Time



 Seeking motivated, results-driven B2B Appointment Setters to help expand our new mid-market team and client base by identifying, contacting, and qualifying prospective clients. This role focuses on outbound outreach to decision-makers, generating interest in our advertising and lead-generation services, and scheduling qualified appointments for our sales team.



This is an excellent opportunity for someone experienced, goal-oriented, comfortable speaking with business owners and marketing managers, and motivated by performance-based earnings. (the more you set, the more you make) 



Key Responsibilities



Conduct outbound prospecting via phone,
, and LinkedIn to business decision-makers



Receive marketing leads to meet with and qualify after 90 days



Identify and qualify potential clients based on target criteria



Schedule appointments and demos for the sales team



Maintain accurate records of outreach, conversations, and scheduled meetings in the CRM



Follow up consistently with prospects who have shown interest



Meet or exceed weekly and monthly appointment targets



Collaborate with the sales and marketing team to improve messaging and outreach strategies



Qualifications



2+ Years of experience in B2B appointment setting, lead generation, or telemarketing preferred



Strong written and spoken English communication skills



Confident speaking with business owners, executives, and managers



Organized and detail-oriented with good time management



Comfortable working with CRM systems, spreadsheets, and outreach tools



Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



Self-motivated and able to work independently during assigned hours



Compensation



With expected performance, on-target earnings (OTE) for this position are approximately $2,890 per month, with upside potential based on results.



Performance Expectations



Daily outbound prospecting activity



Consistent pipeline of qualified prospects



Monthly appointment goals (to be discussed during onboarding)



Professional communication and accurate CRM updates



What Success Looks Like



Successful tea
mbers are proactive, consistent in their outreach, and focused on quality conversations that lead to scheduled meetings and new business.



How to Apply



Submit A short introduction
 about your experience with B2B outreach and appointment setting experience to 



Provide your past results and KPI metrics achieved, and the last position held

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant (Wholesale Focus)
description:

title: Amazon Wholesale VA (With Amazon FBA Experience)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Amazon Wholesale Virtual Assistant to join our growing e-commerce team. This is a long-term role for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and experienced in Amazon FBA wholesale operations.



Responsibilities



You will handle day-to-day Amazon FBA wholesale tasks, including:



Product & Supplier Sourcing



Search for profitable wholesale products using tools such as Keepa, SellerAmp, Helium 10, etc.

Contact and negotiate with authorized distributors & brand suppliers.

Analyze sourcing lists and product catalogs.



Product Analysis



Evaluate product viability (sales rank, competition, cost, ROI, profit margin).

Determine replenishment needs and inventory planning.



Purchasing & Logistics



Create and manage purchase orders.

Coordinate shipments to Amazon FBA warehouses.

Monitor inbound shipments and reconcile discrepancies.



Account Management



Track inventory levels and forecast restocks.

Manage listing updates if needed.

Assist with brand approvals, invoices, and account documentation.



Required Skills & Experience



Amazon Wholesale FBA experience is a MUST

Strong understanding of Keepa, SellerAmp, Helium10, InventoryLab, and other tools

Ability to analyze data and make profitable sourcing decisions

Experience communicating with suppliers

Good English communication skills

Detail-oriented, reliable, and proactive

Fast learner, self-motivated, and able to work with minimal supervision



Work Schedule & Setup



Full-time (40 hours/week)

Remote work

Long-term position with growth opportunity





How to Apply



Please submit the following:



Updated Resume

Brief voice/video introduction (optional but a plus)

Your Amazon Wholesale experience summary

Tools you are proficient with



Subject Line: Amazon Wholesale VA – Your Name

title: FBA Wholesale Account Specialist
description:
Our company is thrilled to announce an incredible opportunity to join our dynamic team as an FBA Wholesale Account Specialist. We are seeking a motivated professional with solid expertise in Wholesale FBA to enhance our business operations and contribute to our continued growth.



Key responsibilities for this role include:

- **Product Research**: Identifying profitable products by evaluating market trends, competition, and pricing.

- **Supplier Sourcing**: Establishing partnerships with reliable suppliers and manufacturers, negotiating favorable terms, and securing high-quality products.

- **Inventory Management**: Overseeing stock levels, placing timely orders with suppliers, and ensuring inventory remains balanced to prevent stock shortages.

- **Listing Optimization**: Crafting compelling and keyword-rich product listings that boost visibility and drive conversions.

- **Order Management**: Handling all aspects of order processing, from tracking shipments to managing returns and addressing customer inquiries.

- **Market Analysis**: Conducting competitor research and staying updated on market trends to refine business strategies.

- **Advertising Management**: Creating and managing Amazon PPC campaigns to increase traffic and bolster sales.

- **Reporting and Analytics**: Compiling consistent reports on sales performance, inventory health, and other essential metrics to guide decision-making.



**Qualifications**:

- Proven expertise in Amazon FBA and wholesale processes.

- Strong analytical abilities for interpreting data and making strategic decisions.

- Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.

- Detail-oriented approach complemented by excellent organizational capabilities.

- Self-starter capable of effectively managing multiple tasks independently.

- Familiarity with Amazon selling tools such as Jungle Scout or Helium 10 is highly advantageous.







If you possess the required qualifications and are eager to thrive in this role, we encourage you to submit your resume. As an FBA Wholesale Account Specialist, you will play a vital role in optimizing operations, enabling us to focus on strategic growth and expansion.

title: After-Hours MSP Helpdesk / NOC Support Team (Weekends & Evenings)
description:
We are a U.S.-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) looking for a reliable after-hours support team to assist with helpdesk and network monitoring outside of normal business hours.



We prefer working with a company or team with multiple technicians rather than a single freelancer to ensure consistent coverage.  We are open to individuals if the person or persons are the right fit



Our business supports small and medium businesses across several industries and uses modern MSP tools and cybersecurity platforms.



This role will primarily cover:



Coverage Needed

• Weeknights: approximately 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM (U.S. Mountain Time)

• Weekends: Saturday & Sunday coverage

• Possible future expansion to overnight monitoring



Responsibilities

• Respond to incoming helpdesk tickets

• Remote troubleshooting for desktops, printers, and basic networking

• Escalate complex issues to our internal team

• Monitor alerts from RMM and security tools

• Basic user administration (password resets, account unlocks, etc.)



Environment

Our stack includes tools such as:

• Syncro MSP (RMM/PSA)

• Microsoft 365 / Azure AD

• ThreatLocker

• Proofpoint

• VoIP systems

• Business networks and Wi-Fi environments



Requirements

• Experience supporting MSP environments

• Strong Windows and Microsoft 365 troubleshooting skills

• Excellent English communication

• Ability to document work clearly in tickets

• Reliable internet and quiet work environment



Bonus Experience

• Network troubleshooting

• Cybersecurity tools

• VoIP systems

• Firewall and VPN troubleshooting



We prefer applicants who have previously worked for a Managed Service Provider (MSP) supporting multiple client environments.



As part of your application, please include a short 2–3 minute video introduction.



In the video, please cover:



Your name and location



Your experience supporting Managed Service Provider (MSP) environments



What RMM or PSA tools you have used (Syncro, ConnectWise, Ninja, etc.)



Your experience supporting Microsoft 365 and Windows users



Please upload your video to Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application.



We are looking for a long-term partnership with a professional team that can grow with us.

title: Video Editor for Social Media Ads
description:
Performance Ad Video Editor (Meta / Paid Social)

Remote | Full-Time | Long-Term



MeiMEDIA is a performance-creative agency focused on building paid ad creatives that convert. We produce high-volume short-form ads for Meta 
 & Instagram) and work with fast-growing brands.

We’re hiring a high-level video editor who understands how to edit for paid social performance, not just organic content.



What You’ll Be Editing

- Short-form performance ads for Meta

- UGC-style talking head videos

- Founder-led ads, testimonials, screen recordings, and product demos

- Multi-clip edits where footage is combined to tell a clear, cohesive story (with occasional light sourcing when needed)

 

This role prioritizes clarity, pacing, and conversion, not cinematic or long-form YouTube edits.



Pace & Output

- 10–12 short-form videos per week

- Fast turnaround with consistent quality

- Clear creative direction and structured feedback



What We’re Looking For

You’re likely a strong fit if you:

- Have hands-on experience editing ads for paid social

- Understand how paid ads differ from organic content

- Can interpret direction quickly and apply feedback efficiently

- Work independently and take ownership of your output

- Are comfortable with both talking-head footage and multi-clip edits

- Can select or source supporting footage when needed to strengthen the story

- Are comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with overlapping deadlines

- Care about pacing, hooks, captions, and clarity

- Are looking for a long-term role, not a short-term gig

 

Bonus if you:

- Have experience with Meta ad best practices

- Think in terms of scroll-stopping 
nts

- Can articulate why an edit works, not just how to execute it



Growth & Opportunity

- This is a long-term role with room to grow. As you prove consistency, speed, and judgment, you’ll:

- Take on more complex edits and higher-impact projects

- Gain deeper exposure to performance strategy and creative testing

- Have opportunities for increased responsibility and compensation over time

 

We value editors who want to level up, and grow with one of the fastest-growing agencies in paid. 

 

Small detail: Include the word “PINEAPPLE” in your application. This helps us filter for applicants who read thoroughly.



About the Environment

- Performance-focused and execution-driven

- Clear standards and direct feedback

- High trust, high accountability

- Work that directly impacts real business results



Compensation

- $1,800–$2,400 USD/month (based on speed, quality, and consistency)



How to Apply

- Complete the application form linked below.

- We review applications based on paid-ad experience, editing capacity, and performance-focused thinking.

- Applications without relevant paid-ad samples will not be considered.

-

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 2b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: SEO & AI Search Specialist (GEO/AEO)
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this role feels like the perfect fit and you meet the qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagyn70NlQQGtKUtK/form



Note: Only applications submitted via the above link will be considered.



---

We’re hiring an SEO & AI Search Specialist to grow organic visibility and revenue across traditional search and AI-driven answer engines. You’ll own strategy and execution for our Shopify stores—
 and 
—covering technical SEO, content, entity/structured data, link acquisition, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)—earning inclusion and citations in Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, Perplexity, and ChatGPT/Gemini.



You’re excited because you will...



Strategy & Ownership

- Build and execute an integrated SEO + GEO roadmap tied to revenue for priority categories (sheet sets, duvet covers, quilts, decorative pillows).

- Define and track a query set for SERPs and AI answers; report share-of-voice and citation/inclusion rate in AI Overviews/answer engines.



On-Site & Technical

- Audit and improve site architecture, internal linking, faceted navigation, canonicals, and crawl budget for Shopify.

- Elevate Core Web Vitals and image optimization for PDPs/PLPs.

- Implement and maintain JSON-LD schema (Product, Offer, Review, Breadcrumb, Organization, FAQ, ImageObject) to strengthen entity understanding.



Content & Entity Building

- Create entity-first, evidence-backed content answer engines trust: buyer’s guides, comparisons, FAQs, care/how-to, sizing explainers, collection hubs.

- Ensure product attribute completeness (materials, thread count, fill, sizes, care, style) so AI systems can recommend or cite our pages.

- Collaborate with brand/editorial to publish on-brand copy optimized for humans and LLMs.



GEO-Specific Initiatives

- Test AI Overview/answer inclusion tactics (structured data, Q&A blocks, citations, author/entity pages, first-party images).

- Monitor and improve brand citation rate in answers for commercial and informational intents.

- Manage AI crawler permissions and robots directives (GPTBot, Perplexity, CommonCrawl) with Engineering/IT.



Off-Site & Authority

- Build a white-hat digital PR/backlink program with home & design publications, blogs, and partner sites.

- Strengthen E-E-A-T signals (author bios, brand story, policies, reviews/UGC, press mentions).



Analytics & Experimentation

- Run experiments; measure impact in GA4 & GSC with dashboards (Looker Studio).

- Prepare periodic reports and present insights and next steps to stakeholders.



90-Day Success

- Baseline audits completed (technical, content, entities, AI answer presence) and a prioritized 6-month roadmap delivered.

- Quick wins shipped: schema fixes, internal linking improvements, attribute completeness for top SKUs/collections, and one entity-driven content hub launched.

- GEO scorecard established (priority queries, inclusion/citation rate, answer snippets captured, supporting pages).



6–12 Month Outcomes

- Material growth in non-brand organic revenue and category rankings.

- Sustained inclusion/citation in AI answers for target queries across core categories.

- Repeatable GEO playbook embedded in content and merchandising workflows.



Job Requirements

- Proven SEO chops in eCommerce (preferably Shopify) with measurable revenue impact.

- Hands-on GEO experience (or a strong POV) optimizing for AI Overviews and answer engines: structuring content for direct answers, citations, and entity confidence.

- Proficiency with Ahrefs/Similar, Google Search Console, GA4, and Shopify; comfort with HTML/Liquid basics and JSON-LD.

- Ability to plan and execute on-brand digital PR/backlink programs.

- Strong analytical skills; can turn data into decisions and roadmaps.

- Excellent English writing/editing skills (you can own outreach and on-site copy).

- High ownership, bias to action, and communication via
, Slack, Zoom, and phone.

- Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent experience).

- Belief in our company mission and embodiment of our values.



Nice to have

- Experience with product feeds (Google Merchant Center), reviews/UGC integration, and PDP/PLP template optimization.

- Familiarity with log-file analysis, bot identification, and AI crawler management.

- Comfort building dashboards in Looker Studio or similar.



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding, linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate customers' lives through beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we are committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping, and low order minimums, we have become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.

/hea-ph-team



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?



At HiEnd Accents, we are a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, a growth mindset, and a commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights. Recognition on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the US reflects our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions matter, we want to hear from you.



Working at HiEnd Accents means you can expect:

title: Shopify Store Specialist
description:

Given the high volume of applicants, we will not be able to consider applications not submitted through this form. Thank you for your understanding!



POSITION DETAILS: SHOPIFY STORE SPECIALIST



MISSION:

To drive E-commerce sales growth through proactive E-commerce account management, including timely and accurate listing management and optimization, digital storefront optimization, and marketing campaign ideation and execution, with the ultimate goal of creating a thriving and sustainable online business that meets the evolving needs of our diverse customer base.

Investigate any unexplained fluctuations and collaborate with customers to resolve issues when necessary.

title: Social media/web design/podcast editing

title: Bookkeeper QuickBooks Online Experienced Contractor
description:
Join Our Team at Solvency Now Bookkeeping as a Bookkeeper! 



Fully Remote 



Are you a QuickBooks Online superstar with a passion for numbers? We’re on the lookout for a Bookkeeper to join our dynamic, remote team! Enjoy the flexibility of working from home while collaborating with fellow bookkeeping experts to deliver top-notch service to our clients.



What You’ll Do:

*Manage bookkeeping for a variety of clients (and yes, we promise they can be fun to work with!)

*Collaborate with a team of bookkeeping pros to elevate our service and support each other in tackling challenges.

*Stay organized and keep deadlines in check while enjoying the perks of remote work.

* Performing bank account and credit card reconciliation.

* Conducting bookkeeping reviews.

* Paying and tracking bills/loans.

* Collecting and tracking invoices.

* Filing 1099(s).

* Calculating and collecting sales tax.

* Payroll filing and reporting.

* Maintaining spreadsheets of financial transactions.

* Submitting a detailed daily report to your direct supervisor.

* Keeping detailed time tracking per client.

* Using internal software to record client work completed.

* Performing other related duties as needed or agreed upon





What’s in it for You:

*Competitive pay: $7-$10/hour based on your experience, plus bonuses after your first 90 days!

*Part Time hours: 20 hours a week, then after 90 days transition to full-time hours: 40 hours a week, with the freedom to 

  work in your time zone.

*A supportive, fun work environment where you can learn and grow alongside industry experts!



What We’re Looking For:

*You must have a strong command of the English language ( Read, Write & Speak) 

*Computer-savvy with a reliable working computer.

*Super organized and able to juggle multiple clients with ease.

*Proficiency in QuickBooks Online is a MUST (1-3 years experience) 



If you’re ready to take your bookkeeping skills to new heights while enjoying the flexibility of remote work and teamwork, we want to hear from you! 



???? Apply today and fill out the application on this link:

As an extension of our clients, you'll be calling and texting prospects, booking appointments, and getting them excited about changing their lives. title: Inside Sales Representative (Setter to Closer Track)
description:
(We're not a VA Agency.)

Salary: Starting at $800–$1,000/month USD + Uncapped Commissions (2% per sale)

Location: Work from Home (Philippines)

Hours: Full-Time, Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central U.S. Time (Night Shift PH)

On-Target Earnings: $1,500–$2,000+ USD/month for high performers



About the Role

BridgeCom Systems is hiring a driven and coachable Inside Sales Representative to join our growing global team. You’ll be working from home, helping warm leads and interested customers learn about our plug-and-play radio solutions.

This role will start as a Setter position (booking appointments, qualifying leads, and moving opportunities forward), but top performers can grow into a Closer role responsible for handling full sales calls and closing deals.



This is not a call center job. You’ll be representing a real U.S. company with real customers and building real relationships. Your job will be to connect, follow up, and close sales over the phone,
, and text using our scripts and proven system.

You’ll receive world-class sales training through Cardone University and daily mentorship. If you’re hungry, coachable, and ready to change your life, this is the career for you.



About BridgeCom Systems

We’re a U.S.-based communications company that’s been in business for over 20 years. We help radio operators stay connected with powerful, easy-to-use radio systems.

We’re a small, friendly, and values-driven team that believes in hard work, ownership, and opportunity. Many of our Filipino tea
mbers have been with us for years—we invest in our people and treat them like family.



Key Responsibilities

Call and follow up with warm leads and existing prospects

Set appointments, qualify prospects, and move deals through the pipeline (Setter responsibilities)

Use scripts to guide conversations and close sales (once promoted into a Closer track)

Send quotes, follow up by text/email, and update the CRM (HubSpot)

Learn and speak confidently about our radio products (training provided)

Log your activities and hit daily targets (calls, appointments, follow-ups, and sales)

Work closely with U.S. teammates for support and coaching



Requirements

Excellent spoken and written English

Sales experience preferred (2-3  year outbound/inbound)

Friendly, confident voice and good phone presence

High-speed internet (min. 10 Mbps) + backup power

Quiet work environment, noise-canceling headset

Coachable, self-motivated, and goal-oriented

Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot a plus)

Tech-savvy and comfortable using web tools and scripts

Willingness to learn about Ham Radio and our industry

Experienced in radio communications systems and technical support



Tools & Setup

You must have:

A fast, reliable wired internet connection

Backup power (UPS or generator preferred)

Quiet workspace free from distractions

A working headset with clear audio

A Windows or Mac computer capable of running multiple apps



How to Apply

To apply,
 your resume and a 30-second voice or video recording introducing yourself and telling us why you’re a great fit to: 

Subject line: Inside Sales – [Your Name] – Found on OnlineJobs.ph

Start your message with: BLUE M&MS

Applications without a video/voice sample WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.



Why Join Us

Work from home with a U.S. company that values Filipino talent

Get paid to train in one of the best sales systems in the world (Cardone U Sales training every day)

Uncapped commissions + stable long-term work

Clear KPIs, daily coaching, and professional growth

Join a growing company with real career opportunities

title: Transportation Tracker
description:
AJG Transport is expanding its route operations division and seeking a reliable, detail-oriented professional to help support and streamline our daily duties. We are looking for a Transportation Tracker to support real time fleet movement, manage load data accuracy, and ensure smooth coordination between drivers, customers, and internal teams. This role is ideal for someone highly organized, proactive, and comfortable operating in a fast paced logistics environment where precision matters



Role Overview

As an Transportation Tracker, you will serve as a real time control point within route operations. Your responsibility is to ensure loads are properly assigned, tracked, updated, and documented while maintaining consistent communication across drivers, brokers, and customers. You will operate within structured SOPs while making fast, sound operational decisions when challenges arise.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Assign and dispatch loads based on driver availability, Hours of Service, and customer requirements

• Monitor live fleet movement using GPS and TMS

• Track and update ETAs, check calls, timestamps, and delivery milestones in real time

• Enter, audit, and maintain accurate load data in Google Sheets and TMS

• Communicate continuously with drivers, brokers, and customers regarding status updates

• Identify delays, route conflicts, detention risks, or service issues and take proactive action

• Escalate operational risks to leadership when necessary

• Generate shift based operational reports summarizing load activity and exceptions

• Follow dispatch, communication, and escalation SOPs consistently

• Maintain clean shift handoffs and organized documentation



What Success Looks Like

• TMS, Google Sheets, and tracking platforms reflect complete and error free data at all times

• Scheduled updates are sent on time

• Critical loads are monitored closely and handled with urgency from start to finish

• Communication is clear, concise, and actionable, both in written updates and verbal escalations

• Operational risks and issues are flagged early with solutions, not just problems

• Shift handoffs are smooth, complete, and well documented

• You become someone the team can depend on during high pressure situations



Who We’re Looking For

• Has experience in logistics, freight brokerage, dispatch, or transportation tracking

• Understanding of fleet coordination, load planning, and HOS awareness

• Familiar with US geography and US logistics trucking operations (a plus)

• Ability to monitor multiple loads and drivers simultaneously

• Understands urgency and prioritization in a live dispatch environment

• Communicates clearly and professionally via zoom, chat, and

• Minimum 45 WPM typing speed

• Can monitor multiple loads at once without losing accuracy

• Pays strong attention to detail and uses sound judgment when issues arise

• Comfortable operating in high volume communication environments

• Follows instructions consistently and values clean execution

• Works well with a team and is open to feedback and coaching. Collaborates without resistance or ego



Why Join AJG Transport?

• Permanent remote opportunity

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Hands on leadership and direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage

• Performance recognition and advancement potential



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time Remote Role| Direct Hire to US Company

• Tuesday - Saturday 7 AM - 5 PM CST (San Antonio time)

• Wednesday - Sunday 8 PM - 5 AM CST (San Antonio time)

• Zoom presence (with camera open and unmuted audio) required

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support

• Shifts may adjust based on operational demand



If you thrive in fast moving transportation operations, understand the importance of real time coordination, and can execute with precision under pressure, we want to hear from you.

b646edb?sid=6fbbf39d-c99f-4583-a6d1-6aa664bd22f7



Apply Here:

title: Virtual Accounting and  Customer Support Specialist
description:
Best Technology has a rare opportunity available within their growing team for an Accounting and Customer Support Specialist. Your days will be kept busy with AR, AP, ACH, Collections, general accounting functions, project management and customer support with the sales teams. This well-rounded position plays a critical cross-functional role supporting accounting operations, equipment project management, and customer service. Quickbooks as well as Intermediate MS Office/Google Workspace skills are required for this opportunity. You will be able to utilize your excellent communication skills, your teamwork ability and your excellent attention to detail.



Our core value starts with People Matter, People First and is supported by our servant leader work culture centering around faith, family, fun, integrity, trust, and daring to be different.



The successful candidate will be responsible for accounting/daily bookkeeping, customer service support, project management, sales and operations support. Candidates must possess meticulous attention to detail, exceptional organizational skills, advanced computer proficiency, and a solid background in accounting/bookkeeping, customer service and project management. An individual who thrives in a fast-paced setting and excels at managing multiple tasks concurrently is a great fit at Best Technology.



Responsibilities:



Bookkeeping/Accounting

 - Accounts Receivable - Invoicing for chemical, parts, and equipment billing including progress billing

 - Accounts Payable - Enter billing from vendors for parts, chemicals, and equipment

 - Resolve vendor billing issues 

- Banking - Daily QBO feeds matched

- Downloading bills and receipts

- Setting customers up with terms

- Setting customers up in QBO

- AR Past Due follow ups with customers

- Weekly ACH/Check payment runs/Upload check file to Bank

- Month end processing - Financial Prep

- Maintain Company Accounting Process Handbook



Equipment Project Management

- Process equipment orders 

- Actively manage project flow and cross-functional execution by processing equipment orders and maintaining proactive communication with the sales team, customers and vendors throughout the entire project lifecycle—from purchase order issuance through delivery and post-delivery closeout 

- Monitor fabrication, shipping, and delivery schedules; proactively identify risks and escalate as needed

- Primary coordinator for communicating with vendors and customers regarding project timelines, shipping, logistics, and customer service requests throughout the entire project lifecycle

- Post equipment delivery - confirm manuals, pictures, drawings, and documents are complete and in the digital file. All items necessary to close the sale are uploaded to the digital file.

- Documentation and checklist for closed sales processes updated and maintained

- Supplier paperwork for equipment and chemical customers filled out and maintained

- Maintain and update Hubspot CRM throughout the project



Spare Parts

- Communicate with customer on equipment parts orders from customer on urgent, line down situations and non line down spare parts

- Work with vendors to ensure proper parts are ordered 

- Accounts Receivable - Invoicing for parts

- Maintain vendor price sheets for parts



Chemical Project Management

- Process chemical orders by communicating proactively with the sales team and customers from the issuance of purchase orders to delivery and post-delivery closeout.

- Review all customer purchase orders for accuracy

- Create sales order and shipment documents for fulfillment by warehouse

- Accounts Receivable - Invoicing for consumable orders

- Accounts Payable - manage vendor billing for accuracy and entry

- Assist in inventory control and order fulfillment for warehouse

- Send final invoices and post sale documentation to customer



Requirements:

Possess high energy, ethical values, honesty, and integrity

Excellent attention to detail with both written and verbal communication skills

A minimum of 2-4+ years experience in Quickbooks accounting, project management

Ability to work independently and coordinate well with tea
mbers

Willingness to exhibit initiative in daily work

Exceptional customer service practices, professional presence and business acumen

Google Apps for Business products: Gmail, Google Sheets, Drive

Quickly embrace, learn and apply new technology and procedures

Ability to manage time well and handle multiple priorities while maintaining a positive attitude and composure

Work collaboratively with all departments as well as customers and vendors to resolve open issues



Preferred Experience:

Accounting or related degree or education

QBO Pro Advisor

Hubspot CRM proficiency

SOS Inventory or Oracle, Netsuite, SAP, etc ERP system proficiency

Strong interpersonal and organizational skills

Challenge oneself into learning something new

Willingness to exhibit initiative in daily work



Benefits: Paid time off



Schedule: 8 hour day shift U.S. CST Timezone



Location: Virtual



Contact 
 for more information.

 Designer with ecommerce experience to help refresh and elevate our

title: Social Media DM Setter / Appointment Setter (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, X)
description:
About Huff Performance



Huff Performance is a rapidly growing online coaching company that helps active adults and lifters resolve shoulder pain and return to pain-free strength training.



Through educational content on Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube, we generate daily conversations with people dealing with shoulder injuries, training limitations, and pain during workouts.



We are looking for a DM Setter / Appointment Setter who will manage social media conversations and help guide qualified prospects toward booking a call with the founder.



This role is critical to the growth of the business and directly impacts how many people we help.



The Role



This role is responsible for managing social media conversations and helping qualified prospects schedule calls.



You will respond to inbound messages from people who engage with our content and guide them through a short conversation to determine if they are a good fit for coaching.



You will also initiate conversations with followers and engaged users to identify people who may need help.



This is an execution role, not a strategy role. You will follow a clear messaging framework and SOP provided by the company.



The goal is not simply booking calls, but identifying qualified prospects who are serious about solving their problem.



This role directly impacts how many new clients enter the business each week. Strong performers will be recognized and rewarded. This position has real earning potential and long term growth opportunities for the right person.



Key Responsibilities



Manage Inbound DM Conversations



Respond to incoming messages on:



Instagram

TikTok




Responsibilities include:



Answering initial questions

Asking intelligent follow-up questions

Identifying potential clients

Guiding conversations toward scheduling a call



Appointment Setting



Your main goal is helping qualified prospects schedule a call.



Responsibilities include:



Sending booking links

Confirming appointment details

Ensuring prospects understand the call process



Outbound Outreach



You will also initiate conversations with followers and engaged users.



Examples include messaging:



New followers

People who like or comment on posts

Story viewers



These conversations should feel natural and conversational. The goal is to identify people who may need help and guide them toward a call if appropriate.



Lead Qualification



Not every conversation should become a call.



You will identify qualified leads by assessing:



Their shoulder or training issues

Seriousness about fixing the problem

Training background

Timeline for solving the issue



Training and conversation examples will be provided.



Follow Ups



Many prospects require follow up before booking.



Responsibilities include:



Checking in with warm leads

Reminding prospects to book their call

Confirming upcoming appointments



Conversation Organization



You will help maintain organization of conversations including:



New leads

Active conversations

Booked calls

Follow ups



No qualified lead should be missed.



Qualifications



We are looking for someone with strong communication skills and experience managing online conversations.



Preferred qualifications include:



Strong written English

Experience managing Instagram or social media messages

Experience with appointment setting or lead qualification

Ability to handle multiple conversations simultaneously

Organized and detail oriented

Reliable and responsive during working hours



Interest in fitness or training is helpful but not required. Full training on the conversation framework will be provided.



Personal Attributes



The ideal candidate is:



A strong communicator

Able to write naturally and build rapport in conversations.



Organized and detail oriented

Keeps track of conversations and follow ups.



Fast and responsive

Replies quickly and keeps conversations moving.



A self starter

Able to work independently without constant supervision.



Professional and reliable

Shows up consistently and communicates clearly.



Work Expectations



Full time role (approximately 40 hours per week)



This role requires availability during the following hours:



1 PM EST – 9 PM EST

Monday through Friday



These hours are important because this is when the majority of social media conversations occur.



During this time you will be responsible for actively managing conversations, responding to new messages, and moving qualified prospects toward booking a call.



This role requires fast response times and consistent attention to incoming messages.



Dedicated to this position



Reliable internet connection



Ability to respond quickly and manage multiple conversations simultaneously



Once fully trained, you will typically manage 50–100+ conversations per day across Instagram, TikTok, and
.



Compensation



Base pay: $600–$800 per month depending on experience



Performance bonuses available based on results.



Bonuses are awarded based on performance including:



Qualified calls booked

Calls that successfully show up

Clients who sign up for coaching after the call



This structure rewards tea
mbers who consistently bring in high quality prospects.



Top performers in this role can significantly increase their income through performance bonuses.



Salary increases are available for consistent performance and long term growth within the company.



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long term.



Full training, SOPs, scripts, and conversation examples will be provided.



Application Instructions



To apply, please include the following:



Your experience with DM management or appointment setting.



Your level of English proficiency.



A short written response to this message:



"I've had shoulder pain for about 6 months when I bench press."



Write how you would naturally respond if someone sent this to you on Instagram. We are not looking for medical advice. Just a natural conversation starter.



A short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and answering:



Your name and where you are located

Your experience with DM management or appointment setting

Why you think you would be a good fit for this role



You can upload your video using Loom, Google Drive, or YouTube.



Start your application with the word "Shoulder."



Applications without this will not be considered.

title: Carrier Sales Representative
description:
GH Logistics is a growing freight brokerage and asset-based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. Our strength comes from reliable carrier partnerships, disciplined execution, and scalable capacity across the U.S.



As our network continues to expand, we’re looking for a Carrier Sales Representative to help us build strong, long-term relationships with carriers and support clean, on-time freight execution. If you enjoy structured outbound work, building partnerships, and working in a fast-paced logistics environment this role offers clear expectations, measurable growth, and career advancement.



Role Overview

This role combines carrier network expansion and load coverage execution.



Carrier Development (Network Growth)

You will be responsible for:

• Reach out to 20-50 carriers daily to introduce GH Logistics

• Verify carriers for insurance, authority, safety, and compliance

• Complete carrier onboarding and setup documentation

• Educate carriers on our lanes and freight opportunities

• Position carriers for repeat, long-term business, not one time loads

• Create at least 1 group chat per onboarded carrier daily

• Send mass
s to carrier lists to support load coverage

• Maintain organized activity tracking and communication logs



Carrier Sales (Coverage & Execution)

• Cover shipments using GH approved carriers

• Source capacity through calls, load boards, and existing contacts

• Book at least 1 load through approved carriers

• Secure at least 1 dedicated lane per week through repeat carrier usage

• Manage carrier communication through structured group chats

• Follow up to create recurring lane opportunities

• Coordinate with internal teams to ensure smooth execution

• Update and maintain tracking spreadsheets daily with accurate activity data



What Success Looks Like

• Consistent 20-50 calls daily

• At least 5 quality carriers onboarded and activated regularly

• Carriers are fully set up, connected, and positioned for repeat freight

• Loads covered on time with clean communication

• Communication is centralized, documented, and reliable

• Carriers move from onboarding to activation to recurring usage



Who We’re Looking For

• Have experience in Carrier Sales, Dispatch, Freight Brokerage, or Trucking Operations

• Comfortable making 20 - 50 outbound calls per day

• Highly organized, tech savvy, and able to manage multiple spreadsheets and group chats

• Type at least 50 WPM

• Thrives in a fast paced and high urgency freight environment

• Communicate professionally via phone, chat, and

• Performance driven and KPI oriented

• Capable of leading structured carrier conversations and daily meetings

• Follows instructions consistently and executes with precision

• Team oriented, coachable, and open to feedback without ego



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time | Monday Friday

• 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (San Antonio time)

• Must work U.S. business hours

• Collaborative Zoom based work environment (with camera open and unmuted audio)

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support



Compensation & Growth

• Starting Base: $8/hour (Up to $10/hour inclusive of performance incentives)

• Performance Incentives: Based on carrier onboarding, activation, and load execution

• Career Path: Carrier Development to Senior Carrier Rep to Account Manager. We promote based on performance and consistency.



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Hands on leadership and direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage

• Performance based advancement



If you’re looking for a role where effort is recognized and growth is tied to output, we’d love to hear from you.



Apply Now: 
/team/
/CarrierDevelopmentBookingSpecialist

title: Executive Assistant to Founder (Path to Chief of Staff)
description:
Executive Assistant to Founder (Path to Chief of Staff)



Full-Time | Remote



We are looking for a highly organised, proactive Executive Assistant to work directly with the founder of a rapidly growing group of companies spanning marketing, media production, events, and strategic partnerships.



This is not a typical VA role.



You will act as the founder’s operational right hand, helping coordinate schedules, partnerships, travel, acquisitions, and communications across multiple businesses.



The goal of this role is simple:



Remove operational friction so the founder can focus on high-value work such as closing deals, training sales teams, partnerships, and company growth.



About the Founder



You will work directly with a founder based in Melbourne, Australia, leading a growing group of companies involved in:



• Marketing and consulting services

• Media production and online shows

• Events and festivals

• Strategic partnerships and acquisitions



The group is currently expanding quickly and exploring acquiring smaller agencies internationally as part of its long-term strategy.



This environment moves fast and involves multiple projects running simultaneously, so organisation and initiative are extremely important.



Your Core Responsibilities

Calendar & Meeting Management



• Manage the founder’s calendar

• Schedule internal tea
etings and external partner calls

• Ensure the founder is prepared for important meetings

• Send reminders for key meetings and commitments



Founder Communication Buffer



You will act as a communication filter between the founder and external parties.



Responsibilities include:



• Coordinating communication with clients, partners, and collaborators

• Sending
s or follow-ups when required

• Scheduling conversations only when necessary

• Ensuring the founder’s time is protected and used effectively



Travel & Logistics



• Book international flights and accommodation

• Coordinate travel schedules and meeting locations

• Book restaurants and venues for meetings

• Prepare travel itineraries



As the company grows, this role may also involve helping coordinate travel for events, speaking engagements, and business meetings internationally.



Acquisitions & Partnerships



One of the group’s strategies is to partner with or acquire smaller agencies internationally.



Your role will include helping coordinate early conversations with potential partners.



For example:



If an agency owner in another country runs a $50K/month agency and is interested in partnering or selling, you would:



• Conduct an initial screening conversation

• Gather key information about their business

• Determine if the opportunity is worth escalating

• Schedule a meeting with the founder if appropriate

• Coordinate logistics if an in-person meeting is arranged



Events & Productions



The group also produces media content and participates in events and festivals.



Responsibilities may include:



• Coordinating schedules for content productions

• Helping organise meet-and-greets and events

• Assisting with logistics for festivals or shows

• Liaising with tea
mbers responsible for creative or production work



Projects may occasionally involve international coordination, such as productions or events in cities like Bangkok, New York, or Melbourne.



Operational Support



• Liaising with operations managers to gather key updates

• Helping coordinate internal projects across teams

• Assisting with CRM updates (GoHighLevel / GHL)

• Helping send follow-ups to clients when deals are closed

• Ensuring tasks across departments stay organised



What the Founder Will Focus On



For the next phase of growth, the founder’s primary focus will be:



• Closing new clients

• Training sales closers

• Meeting potential acquisition partners

• Hiring and interviewing key tea
mbers

• Building company culture



Your role is to help remove administrative and operational distractions so these priorities can happen efficiently.





Who This Role Is For



This role is ideal for someone who:



• Is extremely organised

• Takes initiative without waiting for instructions

• Communicates clearly and professionally

• Enjoys fast-moving environments

• Can manage multiple projects at once



We are looking for someone who thinks ahead and solves problems, not someone who simply waits for tasks.



Growth Opportunity: Path to Chief of Staff



As the group grows, this role has the potential to evolve into a Chief of Staff position.



The Chief of Staff works closely with the founder to help coordinate initiatives across multiple companies and teams.



Responsibilities at that level may include:



• Coordinating leadership teams across the organisation

• Helping manage hiring processes for key roles

• Ensuring strategic initiatives are executed

• Acting as a central organisational point between the founder and the wider team



For the right person who proves themselves highly capable, this role can grow into a senior leadership position within the group.





Why This Role Is Unique



This role offers exposure to:



• Marketing agency operations

• International partnerships and acquisitions

• Media production and events

• Business development and founder-level decision making



You will work directly with the founder and become a key operational support role across multiple growing companies.



How to Apply



To apply, please include:



1?? A short introduction about yourself

2?? Your experience in executive assistant or similar roles

3?? Your availability

4?? Your expected salary

5?? Write the word “Orchestrator” at the top of your application so we know you read the full post.



If you are highly organized and enjoy helping ambitious founders operate at a high level, we would love to hear from you.



If you have completed the 16 personality test + have done an IQ test please list your results.

title: Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance
description:
GH Logistics is a growing freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. Our team is built on strong systems, clear communication, and reliable execution.



As we continue to scale nationally, we are looking for a Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance to help ensure that every load is verified, compliant, and properly tracked before it moves.



If you’re someone who notices the small details, enjoys organized processes, and takes pride in preventing problems before they happen this role may be a great fit.



Role Overview

Your work directly prevents missed pickups, tracking gaps, compliance issues, and communication breakdowns while collaborating closely with Operations, Sales, and Management to ensure loads move smoothly and safely with clear SOPs, structured workflows, and strong team support to help you succeed.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Review next day loads before execution

• Verify driver details (name, phone number, reachability)

• Confirm CDL validity and compliance

• Assign and confirm active tracking (FourKites and/or Samsara)

• Call drivers to confirm pickup and delivery details, appointment times, and equipment requirements

• Download and upload customer tenders when applicable

• Ensure load information is accurate in the TMS and QA trackers

• Document findings clearly and consistently

• Escalate issues when something does not meet standards

• Maintain organized records and support process improvements



What Success Looks Like

• All next day loads are reviewed before execution

• Tracking is active and confirmed

• Potential issues are caught early

• Documentation is clear and organized

• Escalations are timely and professional



Who We’re Looking For

• Have experience in US. logistics, freight, tracking, quality assurance, or operational audit

• Are comfortable auditing details and verifying information

• Understand that small details prevent big operational problems

• Follow SOPs consistently

• Communicate clearly with drivers and internal teams

• Stay organized while handling multiple tasks

• Work well independently in a structured remote environment

• Are open to feedback and continuous improvement

• Have strong written and verbal English skills

• Type at least 50 WPM



Work Setup & Schedule

• Full Time | 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST or 3 PM - 1 AM CST (San Antonio time)

• Must work U.S. business hours

• Collaborative Zoom based work environment (open camera & unmute mic)

• Time tracking tools used to support accountability



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Clear processes and defined expectations

• Structured systems and documented SOPs

• Supportive team collaboration

• Performance based growth opportunities

• Critical role that directly impacts operational success



If you take pride in doing things right and preventing issues before they happen, we’d love to hear from you. 



Apply Here





Visit us:

title: General Manager (GM) — SLB In-Home Care
description:
Location: Remote (USA hours) • Schedule: Full-time, Mon–Fri

Reports to: Owner/CEO • Direct reports: Authorization & Operations Lead (AOL), Compliance/Hours Reporting & Payroll (CHRP), Growth/Physician Coordination & Intake (GPCI), Operations Associate(s)

Compensation: $1200 - $2200 per month



Role Summary

Own people, compliance, growth, and outcomes across Intake, Operations, and Hours Reporting. Drive census growth, audit-readiness, and healthy finances while upholding SLB’s culture.



Key Responsibilities

People & Culture



Lead, coach, and performance-manage AOL, CHRP, GPCI, and Operations Associate(s).



Hire/Fire authority for RNs and LPNs (recruit ? credential approval ? offer ? onboarding ? performance ? separation).



Run weekly 1:1s, role scorecards, training/cross-training; uphold company values.



Compliance Management



Enforce QA gates: Cleared to Work before scheduling; QA-passed documents before hours reporting.



Oversee renewal calendar (30/60/90), monthly mini-audits (client & staff files), and corrective actions.



Approve packet completeness criteria for DMA-6/80, POT/DVN, RN documentation.



Customer & Partner Relationships



Resolve family escalations (>48h) and execute retention “saves.”



Maintain key hospital/physician/referral relationships; support GPCI scripts and playbooks.



Leads, Intake & Growth Oversight



Ensure speed-to-lead, RN assessment show rate, and clean handoff to Operations.



Review weekly pipeline with GPCI; tune targeting and messaging.



Day-to-Day Operations



Run the operating cadence (daily stand-up; reporting window; renewal sweep; mini-audit).



Approve scheduling standards, PRN/OT use, and go-live decisions with AOL.



Financials & KPIs



Own weekly hours forecast; approve staffing plans; ensure timely hours reporting and accurate payroll with CHRP.



Maintain a single KPI dashboard; assign and track corrective actions.



KPIs the GM Owns/Reviews Weekly

Fill rate ? 95% of authorized hours



Timesheet signatures ? 98% by cutoff



Reporting timeliness ? 3 business days; Acceptance ? 99%



Renewals 100% submitted ? 21 days before expiry



Speed-to-lead ? 10 minutes; RN assessment show rate ? 90%



Audit readiness ? 95% (mini-audits); EVV exceptions aged >48h = 0



Financial guardrails: accepted hours vs. target; payroll % within plan



Required Qualifications

Proven team leadership (hiring/firing, coaching, performance management)



Strong relationship skills (families, physicians, referral partners); excellent English (spoken/written)



Data-driven operator: builds/reads dashboards; turns KPIs into actions



Reach out with subject line or beginning of outreach with 'Red Rabbit'





Nice to Have

RN/LPN staffing management experience; PDN/PCS exposure



Prior oversight of internal audits and credentialing programs



SMB/startup scaling experience



Tools We Use

RingCentral (phones/text), Google Workspace, Spreadsheet/GHL (tasks/CRM), Adobe Fill & Sign (e-sign), EVV/scheduling platform(CareBravo), Medicaid portals.



Clinical Staffing Authority (RNs/LPNs) — GM Owns

Recruit & interview; validate GA license status; approve credential packets (QA run by CHRP).



Issue offers; ensure orientation (HIPAA, EVV, i
 reporting, documentation standards).



Performance steps (coaching ? written ? final ? separation); ensure rapid coverage with AOL on separations.

 outreach campaigns (both trade and client audiences) and improving script performance
