title: STR Revenue & Pricing Analyst (Wheelhouse Specialist)
description:
We manage short-term rental properties (Airbnb / VRBO) in the United States. We are looking for a smart and analytical Virtual Assistant from the Philippines who can help manage our pricing strategy using Wheelhouse software.



Your goal is to help increase revenue by adjusting nightly prices based on data, demand, and market trends.



This is a part-time position (5 hours per week).



This role is best for someone who is excellent with numbers, math, and data analysis.



Key Responsibilities

Manage Pricing in Wheelhouse



You will log into Wheelhouse and:



• Review nightly prices for each property

• Adjust minimum and maximum prices

• Adjust weekend vs weekday pricing

• Adjust prices for high-demand events



Market Analysis



• Review competitor pricing

• Monitor booking demand in the market

• Identify dates that are underpriced

• Identify dates that should be priced higher



Revenue Optimization



Your goal is to help us:



• Increase nightly rates when demand is high

• Fill empty nights when demand is low

• Improve total revenue across all properties



Weekly Reporting



Each week you will provide a short report including:



• Pricing changes made

• Demand trends you noticed

• Opportunities to increase revenue



Required Skills



You must have strong analytical ability.



Preferred education:



• Finance

• Economics

• Mathematics

• Statistics

• Data Analytics

• Business Analytics



Required Experience



You must have experience with short-term rental pricing tools, such as:



• Wheelhouse

• PriceLabs

• Beyond Pricing



Experience managing pricing for Airbnb listings is strongly preferred.



Technical Skills



You should be comfortable with:



• Excel or Google Sheets

• Data analysis

• Working with dashboards

• Reading pricing and occupancy trends



Important Personal Traits



We are looking for someone who is:



• Very strong in math and numbers

• Analytical and detail-oriented

• Comfortable working with data

• Curious about improving revenue

• Reliable and organized



Work Hours



Approximately 5 hours per week.



Flexible schedule.



Compensation



Pay will depend on experience.



Expected range: $4 to $8 per hour.



To Apply



Please answer the following questions:



Do you have experience with Wheelhouse, PriceLabs, or Beyond Pricing?



How many Airbnb or short-term rental listings have you managed pricing for?



What is your college degree?



Why do you think you would be good at revenue pricing?

title: Full-Time Online Class Assistant
description:
Job Title: Full-Time Online Class Assistant

Company: Higher Results Education Inc.

Location: Remote (Philippines / Anywhere with stable internet)

Compensation: USD $250/month (paid via Wise)



About Us

Higher Results Education Inc. provides academic support to students in Canada. We are seeking reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented Online Class Assistants to attend live online classes on behalf of students, ensuring that all important information, instructions, and assignments are accurately captured and reported.

This is a great opportunity for someone self-motivated, tech-savvy, and comfortable in a virtual learning environment. High-performing assistants may be considered for team leader positions.



Responsibilities

Attend live online academic classes on behalf of assigned students (using the student’s account/email).

Actively engage in classes, monitor discussions, and follow instructions.

Complete student tasks, activities, assignments, quizzes, and exams as assigned.

Record class sessions for monitoring and reference purposes.

Take detailed notes and summarize key points from each class.



Submit daily class reports including:

Date and time (Vancouver time)

Student name

title: Real Estate Operations & Transaction Support VA
description:
Real Estate Operations & Transaction Support VA



Overview



Seeking a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support real estate operations across residential and commercial activities. This role will focus on documenting processes (SOPs), supporting transaction-related workflows, managing administrative follow-ups, and assisting with website/social media execution as needed. The ideal candidate is highly organized, learns quickly, communicates professionally, and can maintain accuracy in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



1) Process Documentation & SOP Development (Primary)

Document and organize end-to-end workflows, including onboarding processes for new agents (residential and commercial tracks) Create and maintain SOPs, checklists, templates, and internal reference documents

Ensure documentation is clear, structured, and easy to follow for team use



2) Transaction & Operations Support

Assist with transaction-related tasks as assigned (tracking, coordination, documentation support)

Monitor deadlines, follow-ups, and action items to keep work moving forward

Maintain organized records and file structure for quick access and consistency



3) Administrative Coordination & Follow-Ups

Send professional confirmation
s for meetings, trainings, and scheduled appointments

Review calendar items flagged for confirmation and follow through on outreach

Support operational tasks such as requesting pricing/quotes, coordinating orders (e.g., listing signage), and vendor communication (primarily via
)



4) Website & Social Media Support (Secondary)

Support website launch tasks and ongoing updates as requested

Assist with setting up and maintaining social media channels with appropriate tone for residential and commercial audiences

Light Canva support is a plus (not required)



Compensation



$6/hour

Performance incentives/bonuses may be offered based on results and consistency



Qualifications



Strong attention to detail and high standards for accuracy

Professional written communication skills 
 follow-ups and documentation writing)

Highly organized, dependable, and proactive

Fast learner who can work with minimal supervision after initial training

Real estate familiarity is preferred but not required

 subject line to:

title: Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)
description:
Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)



This is not customer service.

This is not inbound order-taking.



This is a phone-driven, outbound enrollment closer role for professionals who know how to control a consult, qualify fast, overcome objections, and close.



We are a U.S.-based online career school enrolling students into IT and Project Management certification programs (CompTIA, PMP, and related tracks). We provide warm leads. You bring the discipline, urgency, and closing skill.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily Reality)



Make high-volume outbound calls to prospective students



Run structured, consultative enrollment calls (needs analysis ? recommendation ? close)



Control the call, set next steps, and ask for the enrollment



Handle objections around price, time, confidence, and urgency



Follow up relentlessly until the prospect converts or disqualifies



Log activity and outcomes accurately in CRM



Hit daily activity targets and monthly enrollment goals



Improve close rates through coaching, scripts, and call reviews



If you don’t like calling, this role will break you.



Who This Role Is For



Proven outbound / inside sales closers



Comfortable dialing daily and living on the phone



Strong command of English with clear U.S. cultural fluency



Confident asking direct questions and pushing for decisions



Competitive, coachable, metrics-driven



Organized and accountable without supervision



Experience selling education, training, coaching, or professional services is a major plus



Familiarity with certifications (CompTIA, PMP) helps—but closing ability matters more



Bachelor’s degree required



Who Should NOT Apply



Anyone who needs inbound-only leads



Anyone uncomfortable asking for money



Anyone who avoids objection handling



Anyone who wants a “soft” admissions role



Anyone who disappears when targets tighten



Schedule



Monday–Friday



10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST



Compensation



Base pay: $1,200–$1,600 USD per month



Performance-based advancement and leadership path



Long-term role with stability and growth for performers



(Top performers move fast. Average performers don’t last.)



What You Get



Warm leads with real intent



Clear scripts, frameworks, and coaching



No gimmicks, no fake promises—just real programs that work



A sales culture that rewards results



Bottom Line



If you can:



Control a sales conversation



Build urgency without lying



Close consistently



Take coaching and improve



You will win here.



If not—this role will expose you quickly.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO (Tech-Savvy / Operations / Confidential Work)
description:
Executive Assistant to CEO (Tech-Savvy / Operations / Confidential Work)

Company: Sliceo

Schedule: Must be available during US business hours and occasionally weekends

Tracking: Hubstaff required



About Sliceo

Sliceo is a technology-focused consulting and advisory firm working with companies in the community association management and property technology space. We help organizations simplify systems, integrate technology, and modernize their operations.

The CEO is building multiple partnerships, integrations, and strategic initiatives, and we are looking for a highly organized, tech-savvy Executive Assistant who can operate as a hybrid between a traditional EA and a Chief-of-Staff style operator.

This role will handle confidential business matters, financial coordination, executive scheduling, and operational support.



Role Overview

This is not a typical virtual assistant role.

You will work directly with the CEO to manage executive operations, technology systems, scheduling, finances, and confidential communications.

The right candidate will be extremely organized, proactive, trustworthy, and comfortable working with modern software tools and AI.

You should enjoy solving problems, improving workflows, and helping a fast-moving executive stay organized.



Responsibilities

Executive Support

• Manage CEO calendar, meetings, and scheduling across multiple time zones

• Coordinate calls with clients, partners, and vendors

• Organize travel, bookings, and personal appointments

• Prepare meeting notes and follow-ups

• Manage confidential documents and communications

Operations & Systems

• Assist with Zoho One administration

• Maintain CRM records and internal documentation

• Help organize workflows and operational processes

• Support technology integrations and system setup

• Assist with research and project coordination

Financial Coordination

• Assist with QuickBooks entries and organization

• Track invoices, expenses, and vendor payments

• Coordinate financial documents when needed

• Assist with both business and occasional personal finance tracking

Client & Partner Coordination

• Schedule meetings with clients and partners

• Assist with proposals and document formatting

• Manage onboarding coordination

• Maintain organized client communications

Technology & AI Support

• Use AI tools to assist with workflows, research, and automation

• Help test and implement new software systems

• Assist with updates to the company website (Wix)

• Create simple graphics or presentations using Canva



Required Skills

Candidates must have experience with the following tools or equivalent platforms:

• Zoho One

• QuickBooks

• Outlook

• Calendar management

• Canva

• Wix

• AI tools (ChatGPT or similar)

Nice to have

• Experience with CINC Systems

• Experience supporting executives or founders

• Experience managing confidential or financial information



Work Requirements

• Full-time (40 hours per week)

• Must work US Eastern Time hours

• Some weekend availability required

• Must use Hubstaff for time tracking

• Must have reliable high-speed internet

• Must have quiet professional workspace

• Dual monitors strongly preferred



Experience Requirements

• Minimum 5 years Executive Assistant experience

• Strong written and spoken English

• Experience working with executives or business owners

• High attention to detail and organization

• Comfortable working with confidential information



Ideal Candidate

You are someone who:

• Anticipates problems before they happen

• Enjoys organizing systems and improving workflows

• Is comfortable managing both business and personal executive tasks

• Is trustworthy and able to handle confidential matters

• Is comfortable using modern technology and AI tools

• Communicates clearly and professionally



Compensation

Salary will be based on experience and skill level.

This is a long-term role with growth opportunities for the right candidate.



How to Apply

Please send the following:

1. Your resume

2. A short introduction about your experience supporting executives

3. Examples of software tools you have used

4. Your internet speed test results

5. Confirmation you can work US Eastern hours

title: CINC Systems Expert – Configuration, Modules & Automation (HOA / Condo)
description:
Job Title

CINC Systems Expert – Configuration, Modules & Automation (HOA / Condo)



READ THIS FIRST 

This role is for someone with deep, hands-on ownership of CINC Systems.

If your experience is limited to using CINC, assisting with setup, or following instructions created by someone else, do not apply.

We are specifically looking for someone who has built, configured, and owned multiple parts of CINC Systems in real HOA/Condo environments.



ROLE SUMMARY 

We are hiring a CINC Systems expert with a deep understanding of how CINC works end-to-end. You will be responsible for configuring, improving, and supporting multiple CINC modules, automations, workflows, and reporting structures.

This is not a narrow role. You are expected to understand how different modules interact and how configuration decisions impact operations, accounting, boards, and homeowners.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES 

You will personally:

• Configure and maintain CINC Systems environments

• Set up, customize, and optimize multiple CINC modules, such as:

o     Violations

o     Work Orders / Maintenance

o     Accounting-related workflows

o    Owner & Board portals

o    Vendors and services

o    Reporting and dashboards

• Build and manage:

o    Automation rules

o    Triggers and workflows

o    Custom fields and layouts

• Support system launches, migrations, and cleanups

• Create clear documentation for system logic and configuration

• Troubleshoot complex CINC issues independently

• Act as a senior internal resource before escalating to CINC support



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE  (Non-Negotiable)

You must clearly demonstrate all of the following:

• Direct, hands-on experience building inside CINC Systems

• Experience configuring multiple CINC modules, not just one

• Strong understanding of how CINC behaves across:

o    Operations

o    Accounting

o    Compliance

o    Board and homeowner workflows

• Ability to explain why configuration and automation decisions were made

• Comfort owning systems without step-by-step instructions

If you have only “helped,” “assisted,” or “supported” CINC work created by others, this role is not a fit.



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS 

Applicants should be prepared to:

• Submit a resume with their application

• Discuss systems they have personally built

• Explain automation decisions and tradeoffs

• Demonstrate ownership, not assistance

You will be asked to give real examples. General or vague answers will be disqualified.



WORKING CONIDTIONS 

• Full-time remote, Independent Contractor

• Flexible EST-aligned hours

o    Pre-launch: Flexible, provided deliverables and communication are met

o    Post-launch: Expected overlap with standard business hours (9–5 or 10–6 EST)

• Occasional weekend work during launch phases

o    Not frequent

o    Communicated in advance

• Time tracking required (Hubstaff)



Must have:

• Personal computer used exclusively for work

• Backup computer, internet, and power

• Quiet, professional workspace



Compensation & Growth

• $9/hour starting rate

• Hourly rate increases based on performance and contribution

• Long-term contractor relationship intended

• Opportunity to help shape systems, processes, and your own role as Sliceo grows

This role is designed for someone looking for long-term stability and ownership, not short-term task work.



CONFIDENTIALITY 

This role involves access to sensitive systems, internal strategy, and proprietary information. Strict confidentiality is required.



REQUIRED APPLICATION QUESTIONS 

Applicants must answer the following:

Describe your hands-on experience with CINC Systems.



Include:

1. Which CINC modules you personally configured or built

2. One automation or workflow you owned end-to-end

3. A system decision you made and why you made it

4. How many years have you used CINC Systems?



***Applications without a resume or without clear ownership examples will not be reviewed.

title: Industrial/Product Designer for Consumer Products - Full Time, Remote
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a highly creative Industrial Designer based in the Philippines to help define and evolve the visual identity of our product portfolio across high-end hair tools and power/home improvement tools.

This role focuses on product form, brand expression, CMF, and user experience. You will translate brand strategy into iconic, emotionally compelling physical products that stand out in competitive global markets.

From premium hair dryers to precision power tools, you will shape a cohesive and recognizable design language that defines who we are — while working closely with our product development team to ensure your vision is thoughtfully executed.

?

Responsibilities

• Lead the form development and aesthetic direction of new products across multiple categories.

• Create a distinctive and consistent design language that strengthens brand recognition.

• Explore concepts through sketching, form studies, ergonomic refinement, and 3D development.

• Develop thoughtful CMF (Color, Material, Finish) strategies aligned with brand positioning.

• Ensure designs consider real-world functionality, usability, and internal component integration.

• Collaborate closely with the product development team to align on feasibility, performance requirements, and manufacturing considerations while maintaining design integrity.

• Produce high-quality renderings and presentation visuals to communicate design intent.

• Conduct trend research and competitive analysis to inform forward-thinking design decisions.

• Contribute to a cohesive product ecosystem across SKUs and categories.



What We’re Looking For

• Strong portfolio demonstrating brand-led product design, form exploration, and CMF expertise.

• Experience designing consumer products (beauty, electronics, tools, home goods, lifestyle products, etc.).

• Exceptional understanding of proportion, ergonomics, surface development, and user interaction.

• Ability to balance aesthetics, functionality, and manufacturability.

• Strong sketching skills (digital or hand).

• Proficiency in 3D modeling and rendering tools such as Rhino, SolidWorks, Fusion 360, KeyShot, or similar.

• Clear communication skills and experience collaborating with cross-functional teams.



What you'll get

Competitive Salary – Earn in USD!

Health Coverage (HMO) – Enjoy peace of mind after one year!

Paid Time Off – Because work-life balance matters!



How to Apply

Please submit your portfolio showcasing concept sketches, form development, CMF exploration, and final product renderings.

We’re looking for designers who create products people recognize instantly — before they even see the logo.



To move forward, please answer the following questions:

*Job Preferences:

Are you comfortable working on graveyard shift, 40hrs/wk?

What is your current salary?

What is your expected salary (in USD, per hour)?

Are you open to working with a time tracker?

Are you able to provide a contact from your previous employer for character reference?

Are you available to start immediately?



*Industrial/Product Designer Experience

Years of experience as Industrial/Product Designer:

Years of experience in design software such as SolidWorks or AutoCAD

Years of experience in designing for plastic, metal, and other relevant materials:

Years of experience in industrial/product design, (consumer electronics and home improvement tools):

Link your portfolio here:

title: Consultative Sales Closer (Remote)
description:
We are seeking a confident, consultative Sales Closer who excels at guiding business owners through meaningful sales conversations and converting qualified prospects into long-term clients.



This role goes beyond traditional sales. You will act as a trusted advisor, leading consultative discussions, identifying business needs, presenting solutions, and confidently guiding prospects toward a decision.



The ideal candidate is someone who understands that great sales are built on trust, clarity, and leadership in the conversation. You should be comfortable speaking with business owners, running structured demo calls, addressing objections, and confidently moving conversations toward a close.



This is a performance-driven role where strong communicators and skilled closers can thrive by building relationships while driving results.



Key Responsibilities



• Conduct consultative sales calls and product/service demos with business owners

• Lead structured conversations to uncover client needs and opportunities

• Position solutions clearly and confidently based on client goals

• Handle objections professionally and guide prospects toward informed decisions

• Build strong rapport and credibility with decision makers

• Maintain control of the sales process from presentation through closing

• Follow up with prospects to finalize agreements and secure commitments

• Consistently meet or exceed sales performance targets



What We’re Looking For



• Fluent English with a neutral or clear accent

• Exceptional communication and conversational skills

• Confidence speaking with business owners and decision makers

• Ability to run client-facing demo calls and presentations

• Strong consultative sales approach and relationship-building skills

• Skilled at handling objections and guiding prospects toward decisions

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment

• Highly motivated, organized, and results-oriented

• A natural closer who enjoys achieving targets and driving revenue



Compensation



Starting at $10/hour + commission (depending on experience)

Commission for every successful signed client

Performance-based growth opportunities

High performers can significantly increase earnings through commissions





Benefits & Perks



Health Insurance – Medical Stipend Program

We provide a Medical Stipend Program to help you enroll in the health insurance plan of your choice.



- Up to 100,000 PHP per year toward your health insurance policy

- Eligible after 90 days of employment

- Choose coverage that fits your needs, location, and preferred providers

- You may include beneficiaries (spouse, children) as long as total premiums stay within the allowance

- Annual premium is divided into weekly payments and added to your paycheck

- If your chosen plan exceeds the allowance, you simply pay the difference



Internet Allowance



- PHP 1,500 per month



Rice Allowance



- 1,000 per month



Annual Bonus



- Equivalent to one month’s base pay

- Paid annually on your work anniversary



Paid Time Off (PTO)



- 1 week paid vacation leave

- 1 week paid family/sick leave

- Use-it-or-lose-it policy to encourage rest and family time



- Tuition Reimbursement



50,000 PHP annually for your education or a family member’s educational expenses



To apply: 
/jobs/sales-development-representative-14

title: Email Marketing Manager (ECommerce) - Full Time, Remote
description:
We are looking for a strategic and performance-driven
 & SMS Marketing Manager to lead the charge in growing and optimizing our owned marketing channels. This role is key to delivering high-converting campaigns that drive customer engagement, retention, and revenue across our skincare and hair care product lines. You’ll turn customer insights into action, bringing value at every touchpoint while aligning messaging with product and brand goals.





Primary Duties and Responsibilities:

Own the strategy, execution, and optimization of all
 and SMS campaigns for multiple product lines (e.g., hair thinning shampoo, supplements, anti-aging SPF, and skin supplements).

Segment audiences and personalize messaging to maximize relevance, engagement, and conversion.

Develop and manage high-performing lifecycle flows including welcome, cart abandonment, post-purchase, and win-back sequences.

A/B test subject lines, content, offers, and creative assets to continuously improve key performance metrics (CTR, open rate, CVR, revenue per send).

Monitor and report on campaign performance; adjust strategy based on insights and trends.

Build surveys and gather customer feedback to inform future content and product ideas.

Collaborate with creative, product, and customer experience teams to ensure consistent and on-brand messaging.

Maintain a strong understanding of compliance and best practices in
/SMS marketing (e.g., CAN-SPAM, TCPA).

Suggest and implement new technologies, tools, and tactics to stay ahead of the curve.





Qualifications:

3+ years of experience in
 and SMS marketing, ideally in eCommerce or beauty/wellness.

Expert in Klaviyo or similar marketing automation platforms.

Strong writing skills and a keen eye for visual branding and user experience.

Solid understanding of customer behavior, segmentation, and marketing psychology.

Results-oriented with a deep passion for data, testing, and optimization.

Familiarity with tools like Rebuy or product recommendation engines is a plus.

Proactive, curious, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

Passion for skincare, wellness, and helping people feel their best.





What You’ll Help Shape:



Your role goes beyond sending campaigns—you’ll help us build smarter customer journeys by listening to our audience. You'll turn feedback into better product launches, sharper messaging, and a stronger brand voice. You’re part marketer, part strategist, part customer advocate.
